name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Republicans just confirmed Amy Coney-Barrett. Here's what you can do to fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We lost this one, and it hurts. But we still have time to win back the Senate -- and we have to give this fight everything we've got. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510d/45c30650/1c6141d5e/66e8aea1/3182414861/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Let's be clear about what just happened:

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their Republican buddies have shoved aside the wishes of the American people in order to steal another Supreme Court seat.

They stole another Supreme Court seat just eight days before the end of the election, after tens of millions of Americans had already cast their ballots, and just 15 days before the Supreme Court will hear a case that could overturn the Affordable Care Act.

They broke every rule in the book, even the ones they'd made up.

Hundreds of thousands of Americans are dead, and millions are waiting for the federal government to finally show up and fight this pandemic, but Republican senators said: Sorry, no time. Senate Republicans had better things to do than pass a relief package -- things like steal a Supreme Court seat.

**We lost this one, and it hurts. But we still have time to win back the Senate -- and we have to give this fight everything we've got.**

**[Today, I'm asking if you can donate directly to the campaigns of Democrats running to flip GOP Senate seats right now. Every contribution will make a real difference to help get our candidates over the finish line in the last eight days of this election season.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510d/45c30650/1c6141d5e/66e8aea0/3182414861/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNlbmF0ZS1yMmIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVzE0Rl9PVEhfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDEwMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-senate-r2b?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW14F_OTH_EWD_E_20201026_V1S2_P")**

When we fight side by side, we have power -- and that is exactly what Republicans are scared of.

The Republican Party is scared they can't win through the democratic process. Scared that they can't win by playing by the rules. That they can't win when the American people decide the outcome. That they can't win when elections matter.

Here's the ugly truth: confirming Amy Coney Barrett is their path to advance an extremist agenda, long after the country is fed up and disgusted with their failures. In the middle of an election, in the depths of a pandemic, their extremist agenda is all that matters, and that's why they were so desperate to ram her nomination through the Senate.

A vote for Barrett was a vote to strip health care coverage from millions of people. To turn back the clock on reproductive freedom. To endanger Dreamers and immigrants. To let climate change rampage unchecked. To imperil efforts to address systemic racism. To place workers' rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun violence prevention at risk.

Let's be very clear: now that Trump and Republicans have succeeded in ramming this nomination through, the American people will expect us to use every tool we have to undo the damage and restore the Court's integrity.

**Democrats fought tooth and nail, but the Republicans control the Senate -- for now.** The reason the Republicans were willing to break every rule to jam through an illegitimate nomination eight days before the election is that they have realized a truth that shakes them down to their core: the American people are not on their side.

**People all over this country are fighting to reclaim our democracy.** They are registering to vote -- and they are voting. They are voting like never before. They are speaking out and telling their stories. They are fighting for a democracy that works for all of us, not just for the privileged few. And they will continue to fight until they've taken our democracy back from those who have worked around the clock to undermine it.

**[Help keep up the fight by making a direct donation, if you can, to the campaigns of Democratic challengers running to flip Republican-held Senate seats in the next eight days. Let's take back the Senate and make our government work for everyone.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510d/45c30650/1c6141d5e/66e8aea0/3182414861/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNlbmF0ZS1yMmIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVzE0Rl9PVEhfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDEwMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-senate-r2b?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW14F_OTH_EWD_E_20201026_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510d/45c30650/1c6141d5e/66e8aea0/3182414861/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNlbmF0ZS1yMmIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVzE0Rl9PVEhfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDEwMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-senate-r2b?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW14F_OTH_EWD_E_20201026_V1S2_P")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: Senate Confirms Amy Coney Barrett
body:
Following a unanimous vote by the Judiciary Committee last week, the Senate just confirmed Amy Coney Barrett for the High Court. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cce9deeea3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 26, 2020
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: Senate Confirms Amy Coney Barrett**

**After a unanimous vote** by the Judiciary Committee last week, the Senate just confirmed Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals Judge Amy Coney Barrett to become the 115th Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court.

**“Having confirmed her** to the Circuit Court in 2017 with bipartisan support, the Senate has already undertaken a thorough and rigorous review of her record,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) said after President Trump made the nomination last month.

**Throughout Justice Barrett’s career** , she has faithfully upheld the U.S. Constitution as written. The American Bar Association gave Barrett its highest rating, and she has an impressive track record across the legal profession—as a judge, professor, and litigator.

**Most important,** she will bring a valuable new perspective to our nation’s High Court:
* Justice Barrett is the **first mother of school-aged children** to become a Supreme Court Justice. She is also only the fifth woman ever to serve.

* As the mother of a **child with special needs** , she understands the issues and concerns confronting our nation’s most vulnerable people.

* Justice Barrett is the **only current justice** to have a law degree from a school other than Harvard or Yale. She graduated at the top of her class from Notre Dame Law School in Indiana.

**Justice Barrett** has made her philosophy clear: She will not legislate from the bench. “Courts have a vital responsibility to the rule of law, which is critical to a free society, but courts are not designed to solve every problem or right every wrong in our public life,” she said during her confirmation hearings.

**“The policy decisions** and value judgments of government must be made by the political branches, elected by and accountable to the people,” she added.

**One letter—**[**written by Justice Barrett’s former law clerks**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c069644241&e=3ee4985eea)—calls her approach principled and independent-minded. “Judge Barrett taught us that a good judge will not always like the results she reaches; a good judge goes wherever the law leads,” it says.

**Justice Barrett is the very model** of a sympathetic yet impartial judge, according to her colleagues at Notre Dame Law School. She is exactly the type of person whom the American people deserve to have sitting on their Supreme Court.

**“If we are to protect** our institutions, and protect the freedoms, and protect the rule of law that’s the basis for the society and the freedom that we all enjoy—if we want that for our children and our children’s children—then we need to participate in that work,” Justice Barrett said.

🎬 [**WATCH: Why Justice Barrett accepted President Trump’s nomination**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a61b32879&e=3ee4985eea)
---

clean_body: Following a unanimous vote by the Judiciary Committee last week, the Senate just confirmed Amy Coney Barrett for the High Court. | | | | | The White House • October 26, 2020 | | | BREAKING: Senate Confirms Amy Coney Barrett After a unanimous vote by the Judiciary Committee last week, the Senate just confirmed Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals Judge Amy Coney Barrett to become the 115th Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court. “Having confirmed her to the Circuit Court in 2017 with bipartisan support, the Senate has already undertaken a thorough and rigorous review of her record,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) said after President Trump made the nomination last month. Throughout Justice Barrett’s career , she has faithfully upheld the U.S. Constitution as written. The American Bar Association gave Barrett its highest rating, and she has an impressive track record across the legal profession—as a judge, professor, and litigator. Most important, she will bring a valuable new perspective to our nation’s High Court: Justice Barrett is the first mother of school-aged children to become a Supreme Court Justice. She is also only the fifth woman ever to serve. As the mother of a child with special needs , she understands the issues and concerns confronting our nation’s most vulnerable people. Justice Barrett is the only current justice to have a law degree from a school other than Harvard or Yale. She graduated at the top of her class from Notre Dame Law School in Indiana. Justice Barrett has made her philosophy clear: She will not legislate from the bench. “Courts have a vital responsibility to the rule of law, which is critical to a free society, but courts are not designed to solve every problem or right every wrong in our public life,” she said during her confirmation hearings. “The policy decisions and value judgments of government must be made by the political branches, elected by and accountable to the people,” she added. One letter——calls her approach principled and independent-minded. “Judge Barrett taught us that a good judge will not always like the results she reaches; a good judge goes wherever the law leads,” it says. Justice Barrett is the very model of a sympathetic yet impartial judge, according to her colleagues at Notre Dame Law School. She is exactly the type of person whom the American people deserve to have sitting on their Supreme Court. “If we are to protect our institutions, and protect the freedoms, and protect the rule of law that’s the basis for the society and the freedom that we all enjoy—if we want that for our children and our children’s children—then we need to participate in that work,” Justice Barrett said. 🎬 | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump greet trick-or-treaters at the White House Halloween event | October 25, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 USA · 202-456-1111

| | With the confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett sadly becoming official just minutes ago, I wanted to make sure you saw exactly where my opponent stands, and why we have to unseat him this November.

| This afternoon, Rep. Adam Kinzinger voiced his support for Amy Coney Barrett.
---
|
---
| He could have remained silent, but he chose instead to be crystal clear in where he stands on the issues Barrett is sure to address.

**Adam Kinzinger opposes Roe v Wade.

Adam Kinzinger opposes the Affordable Care Act. **

And in opposing these two things, Kinzinger opposes equality, he opposes the right to choose, and he opposes healthcare.

Barrett’s confirmation is inevitable, but Kinzinger’s reelection is not. Early voting numbers have us neck-and-neck.

And in opposing these two things, Kinzinger opposes equality, he opposes the right to choose, and he opposes healthcare. Barrett’s confirmation is inevitable, but Kinzinger’s reelection is not. Early voting numbers have us neck-and-neck. We can defeat Adam Kinzinger, but we can’t do it without your help. or I need you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Nehls?=
subject: Sheriff Nehls NEEDS YOUR HELP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc9d97d65bd7/i-need-your-help-907030?e=e4728463fc)
---
| |
---
| |
#### Hello Nehls Supporters!

We are winding down to the stretch of the campaign. We have just ten days left until Election Day. Sheriff Nehls is working hard every day at the polls greeting voters and the response has been very positive!

The campaign is in good position, in large part due to our volunteers, _but we need to drive all the way through to November 3 rd_.

On Election Day, Fort Bend County alone has 83 polling locations. With three shifts at each location, we need to fill up to 249 shifts. At a minimum, we want to fill the morning and evening shifts at over half that number of locations.

_That means we need at least 80 volunteers!_

**If you can help, we need to hear from you soon so we can start scheduling!**

All you need to do is reply to this email _with your phone number_. One of our interns will call you to help you get scheduled and make sure you have a Troy Nehls sign to take with you.

If you have been helping at polling locations already, we just need that one last day. Please consider signing up for a location near you as soon as you can.

_If you have not helped yet, we need you!_ This is an easy way to support Sheriff Nehls! A shift is only four hours and we can be very flexible with time and location.

Every national analyst believes this is a close election. Every voter could count. We want to leave them with a final positive impression of Sheriff Nehls as they walk in to vote. **Your commitment to only four hours will go a long way to assuring Troy Nehls is your next Congressman!**

Reply to this email now and then be ready to help us celebrate on November 3rd!
####
\- Team Nehls

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Senate Republicans just confirmed Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
The American people might think that the Senate would be doing everything in our power to address the COVID-19 pandemic -- but they would be wrong. Instead, Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP fast-tracked President Trump's nominee to fill the vacancy on the U.S. Supreme Court.
There has been an orange cloud over this confirmation from the start -- and the reason that the Republicans have rushed this process is simple. They needed to confirm a right-wing justice to the Supreme Court before their case to eliminate the Affordable Care Act is heard on November 10.
**[Now, the American people can send the Republicans a clear message by taking away their Senate majority. Will you pitch in $5 now to help Democrats flip the Senate?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201026i_1077&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
There has never been a Supreme Court Justice confirmed this close to Election Day. It is shameful that Senate Republicans turned their back on tradition and their own precedent from 2016 to pursue this power grab and install a conservative justice to support the GOP's agenda.
We can't afford more of Mitch McConnell's failed leadership. We need to elect a Democratic Senate majority -- and that starts by defending our Democratic Senate seat right here in Illinois.
**[Make a $5 contribution right now to keep this seat blue and take back the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201026i_1077&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201026i_1077&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *

clean_body: Peter, The American people might think that the Senate would be doing everything in our power to address the COVID-19 pandemic -- but they would be wrong. Instead, Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP fast-tracked President Trump's nominee to fill the vacancy on the U.S. Supreme Court. There has been an orange cloud over this confirmation from the start -- and the reason that the Republicans have rushed this process is simple. They needed to confirm a right-wing justice to the Supreme Court before their case to eliminate the Affordable Care Act is heard on November 10. "=" There has never been a Supreme Court Justice confirmed this close to Election Day. It is shameful that Senate Republicans turned their back on tradition and their own precedent from 2016 to pursue this power grab and install a conservative justice to support the GOP's agenda. We can't afford more of Mitch McConnell's failed leadership. We need to elect a Democratic Senate majority -- and that starts by defending our Democratic Senate seat right here in Illinois. "=" My best, Dick Durbin "=" * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Team,

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: We won't give up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Today, the Senate voted to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court.
I know that so many of you are furious and heartbroken right now -- so am I. But I'm also focused.
I'm focused on making sure that on November 3rd we tell President Trump and Mitch McConnell we are absolutely done with how they've jeopardized our health care, our rights, and our democracy. We can take back the White House and Senate, but these races are tight and we need your help.
**[In eight days, we have the opportunity to beat Mitch McConnell and flip the Senate. Will you pitch in $5 now to help elect Theresa Greenfield, MJ Hegar, and Jaime Harrison?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201026i_525&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We may be angry now -- but we aren't giving up. We will not forget how the Senate Republicans broke precedent and tradition by confirming a Supreme Court Justice so close to Election Day.
And we will not stand by while the GOP attempts to overturn our affordable health care laws and the protections that millions of patients with pre-existing conditions across the country rely on.
Let's stay focused, and channel all that energy into electing a Democratic Senate majority.
**[We aren't done fighting. Can you rush in a $5 contribution to help elect Theresa Greenfield, MJ Hegar, and Jaime Harrison -- and flip the Senate?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201026i_525&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201026i_525&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Endorsement Alert: Current PA Auditor General Eugene DePasquale endorses Nina Ahmad to succeed him!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , Earlier today, I was honored to receive the endorsement of outgoing PA Auditor General Eugene DePasquale and the next Congressman for Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. Eugene's focus on accountability and transparency as Auditor General has transformed the Office of the Auditor General and I look forward to building on his legacy. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/tyz73AN6TndC_jXWQUCmZP7KN9csjDbIZLOE2y7JJvE=?v=hc9cExCHzlw) [Click here to view full video](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/tyz73AN6TndC_jXWQUCmZP7KN9csjDbIZLOE2y7JJvE=?v=hc9cExCHzlw) With 8 days left until November 3rd, I've been encouraged by voters I've spoken to across the Commonwealth who have already cast their votes in this critical election. But there are still many who have yet to vote. Please make a plan to vote. Tell your friends, tell your family...tell everyone you come across. The stakes are far too high to stay on the sidelines. [**Can you please help me today with $5,_ _**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/CC9SvQ6Gpup3o5Dq4ONDnHOuyFJQAa15bPk_tz2jATA=)**[$10, $20.20 or $100? Can I count on you to help get my message to all of PA?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/CC9SvQ6Gpup3o5Dq4ONDnHOuyFJQAa15bPk_tz2jATA=)** Thank you in advance and together we can move PA forward. Humbly Yours,
Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/AF11Lb_2FgRlDKZRvAFF0xlj4sg11TmW2-nfcyszqd0=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/CC9SvQ6Gpup3o5Dq4ONDnHOuyFJQAa15bPk_tz2jATA=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/PghCLZfGAclzLZr_FZSvTED3NiMFXKWYp5KHY4fg91A=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/yFqW0UXj6cTV-dhfr5WtxxYdcKUh4CtQSh3DrV6SUZI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfwIi6Ugwrxks_EpAJsgYFcA5u4wEk93wvaSWcZujMM=/y4MoCJju8RQel70WdPM1ez6IBUIIob1b4BFFxN1ZqTc=?hl=en)

There's only 1 week left until Election Day!
We are officially entering the homestretch, but that doesn't mean we can coast because the Democrats are coming for us. Mini Mike Bloomberg is planning to spend $100 million dollars before Election Day, and he's just one of the Democrats' mega-donors. We have to step up and hold the line because Florida must stay red on November 3rd.

We are officially entering the homestretch, but that doesn't mean we can coast because the Democrats are coming for us. name: Jim Jordan
subject: The last time i'll ask for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)
---

Peter,

We're getting down to the wire. Election Day is right around the corner, and it has become increasingly clear that there are two very different visions for our country being debated.

One vision which consists of:
* Limited government and support for individual liberty
* A pro-growth, deregulatory agenda
* Keeping the American economy OPEN

And Joe Biden's vision which consists of:
* Raising taxes
* Defunding the police
* Holding our economy hostage

We'll continue doing our part to fight back against the radical left and help put President Trump over the finish line, but our fighting comes at a cost and we need to know that you will have our back. **[That's why today I'm asking you to re-affirm your endorsement of my campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)**.

Since we first asked for your endorsement in April, more than 100,000 conservatives have personally endorsed me for re-election. **[Now, with SEVEN days until the end of this election cycle, we're setting a goal to grow the number of endorsements to 150,000.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)

As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me. They simply cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that **[Democrat leaders in the House are more focused on tearing apart the Republican Party than delivering for the American people.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)**

If you agree with me that:

* We need to keep the American economy OPEN
* Do everything we can to keep socialist sympathizers out of power
* Stop the left's campaign of "cancel culture"

**[Then please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)**

**Your endorsement** will serve our team well as I continue to fight for an America FIRST agenda in the House.

For liberty,
Jim Jordan

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56697810:WDcN2dKNG:m:1:2247059263:57B385A675AA911F8A8751A2748FF1D3:r)

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

subject: Texas is under attack - will you defend Sheriff Nehls?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Friend, Texas is under attack from the radical left. They’re defunding our police in cities like Austin and they’re trying to impose higher taxes and job killing regulations on our economy. In less than TWO WEEKS, our state will decide our future and it’s either crippling economic restrictions or the free market. Democrats have been clear: pack the court, abolish the filibuster, raise your taxes, and ban fracking. Their policies would wreak havoc on the Texas economy and send an already struggling economy into recession. We CANNOT allow that to happen. [Stand With Troy – Donate $20!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/5b1f0130b46ce742c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Stand With Troy – Donate $50!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/fcc368c9054c8cdec3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Stand With Troy – Donate $100!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/cdc2ff718c053af1c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Stand With Troy – Donate $500!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/87517235bb1d2850c3d6b838967d376c/35193) **[That’s why I’m asking you to rush a contribution to Troy Nehls today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/d402acbec0e3461cc3d6b838967d376c/35193)**. We have to take back the US House and stand against the socialist Democrats. Troy is a law and order Sheriff who isn’t afraid of a fight. He’ll stand tough against Nancy Pelosi and defend your constitutional rights and freedoms. We need Troy Nehls in the US House but it will take your support. **[Rush a contribution now to send a law and order Sheriff to Congress](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/fcb59276738c0c7ec3d6b838967d376c/35193)**. \- Senator Ted Cruz [Stand With Troy – Donate $20!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/ff170c98db194b8ec3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Stand With Troy – Donate $50!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/086dcb2b06f86a34c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Stand With Troy – Donate $100!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/64f729a16f773e0fc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Stand With Troy – Donate $500!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/c5ae152b72be6027c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/cbc485e669c97600c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/20034196be896324/2dea46e6b7eff1cfc3d6b838967d376c/35193)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, OCTOBER 27, 2020
KELLY LOEFFLER VOTES TO CONFIRM JUSTICE AMY CONEY BARRETT
ATLANTA - Yesterday, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler proudly cast one of the deciding votes to confirm Justice Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Click the photo below to see Senator Loeffler's [reaction](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013ze2WW_y1-go0n0mPKKTUbPY9sikFQrSQ6yoL3mqgPei_BOaI1BFkr5WG68ZwY7_qps-ZpiFdmau7dKLo_ctla885DTtZcoN1ei8f8eld7W33aRZ7HnYQ72L94G9lxqjCS5b-W680SqZ-gjOELkvW_ck9G23YA2lZSO9C50n3lzxLpYZb-CsKJVRTHduuCRw&c=mLgFOkgg9Y0aLi3lAv5KVi_YFcbr152yzLGgEy0zoj55BfFaVhG2BQ==&ch=7rN0WL9lD5cryKdzMT8mdFNWaJhzIDDqAgsmwEtNdnzpJZyq3qP9JQ==) after voting to confirm Justice Barrett.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013ze2WW_y1-go0n0mPKKTUbPY9sikFQrSQ6yoL3mqgPei_BOaI1BFkr5WG68ZwY7_qps-ZpiFdmau7dKLo_ctla885DTtZcoN1ei8f8eld7W33aRZ7HnYQ72L94G9lxqjCS5b-W680SqZ-gjOELkvW_ck9G23YA2lZSO9C50n3lzxLpYZb-CsKJVRTHduuCRw&c=mLgFOkgg9Y0aLi3lAv5KVi_YFcbr152yzLGgEy0zoj55BfFaVhG2BQ==&ch=7rN0WL9lD5cryKdzMT8mdFNWaJhzIDDqAgsmwEtNdnzpJZyq3qP9JQ==)
---
| "Justice Amy Coney Barrett is an exceptional jurist, a devoted wife and mother, and I believe will be known for being one of the preeminent legal minds in our country's history," Senator Loeffler said. "As the first U.S. Senator to call for the nomination and confirmation of a new Associate Justice to the Supreme Court, I was honored to vote to confirm Judge Barrett's nomination to our nation's highest Court.
"I voted to confirm Justice Barrett because she will interpret the law as written, uphold the Constitution and protect individual liberties guaranteed to every American that are unfortunately far too often under attack.
"Sadly, Senate Democrats decided to try to block this confirmation - all while holding up coronavirus relief for hardworking Americans. Nonetheless, Senate Republicans stood with precedent - and the will of the American people - to fulfill our duty and confirm Amy Coney Barrett.
"Justice Barrett has already proven herself to be a true defender of the Constitution as an originalist who will protect our rights. I firmly believe Amy Coney Barrett will go down as one of the strongest Supreme Court Justices in our country's history, and her confirmation today is a victory for America."
---
| ### Stephen Lawson Communications Director stephen@kellyforsenate.com
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

---
| | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075

name: Roger Misso
subject: Tonight! The biggest Veterans & Election 2020 event of the year - tickets just $10!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

Tonight is our last, major event of the election cycle! Join us for a [Post-9/11 Veterans & Military Families Muster](https://act.myngp.com/el/cjxm_sgbgXOgSgybzMBXjdnTROj-9Do7j22qlhdIG_8=/z9UMzU3GG8fnSw1-WDw8-zzFQBY-a5zFE81Z63-q5WQ= this diverse slate of extraordinary speakers for our last event before the election. The Muster is a Post-9/11 Veterans & Military Families conversation about our role in the upcoming election - and beyond. Get your ticket \(starting at $10!\) today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tth_muster) on our role in the 2020 election - and beyond. Veterans have been at the forefront of this election cycle, whether as candidates or as "losers" and "suckers" according to our Commander-in-Chief. Now? It's time to take our country back, together.

We will hear from some of the leading veteran voices of our generation - former Cabinet Secretaries, LGBTQ+ advocates, Lincoln Project advisors, candidates for the US House and Senate, and more. [We will even have a surprise special guest!](https://act.myngp.com/el/cjxm_sgbgXOgSgybzMBXjdnTROj-9Do7j22qlhdIG_8=/RcYXXIPrw5_36SmEn7rCmVcfwA7Rb6NAiKfn2hvcVy0=) There will be music, motivation, and a mission: restore decency and integrity to Congress. The event starts at 7:30 PM EST via Zoom, so you can join us from anywhere!

[_**Tickets start at $10, but they are limited, so we are asking you to get yours now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/cjxm_sgbgXOgSgybzMBXjdnTROj-9Do7j22qlhdIG_8=/RcYXXIPrw5_36SmEn7rCmVcfwA7Rb6NAiKfn2hvcVy0=) Even if you're not a veteran or military family member, we still need you there. Let's "pack the Zoom!"

All the funds raised for this event will support our diverse slate of [11 US Senate and 18 US House candidates](https://act.myngp.com/el/cjxm_sgbgXOgSgybzMBXjdnTROj-9Do7j22qlhdIG_8=/hu9lo-egljkOo6YlizspYm3RQ6-DrOQ6kp-GlPU97ck=). We can't wait to have this conversation with you on Tuesday!

In solidarity,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director

Peter \-- ONE WEEK AWAY! Will Walz' be able to keep his Emergency Power??? **Imagine watching the results come in on November 3rd and Walz' House posse all get re-elected. We're stuck needing four more votes in the Minnesota House to End Walz Emergency Powers. Democrats remaining in strong control means Walz' powers stay.** If politicians like Brad Tabke, John Persell and their liberal buddies get sent back to St Paul by the voters, we're going to be forced to live under Walz' tyrannical dictates for another year. It's been 228 days of this so-called emergency that Walz has used to take away our liberties, shut down our businesses and compromise our children's education. Now with more COVID cases, our Tyrant-in-the-Making is threatening continued shutdowns. On top of that, school districts in Minnesota are meeting and moving towards going 100% distance learning. None of these Democrats seem to care about your opinion. So it's time to make your opinion matter on November 3rd. **But I'm afraid election day will come and we won't be able to get our message out to all the voters. You can take that fear away by contributing to our Last 7 Day Advertising Blitz.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/shutdown_kings?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control&n=2) If we want to End Walz' Emergency Powers, politicians like these guys MUST go! **We need your help to fully fund our Last 7 Day Advertising Blitz. We've shown what we can do with your support. When we started this campaign to End Walz' Emergency Powers, we only got 15 votes. Now we're four votes shy of terminating them for good!
If politicians Brad Tabke, John Persell, Dan Wolgamott and gang don't want to listen to us in St Paul, then it's time their voters hear about their crummy politician's record.

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hello Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw my most recent e-mail showing clearly where my opponent and I stand on the issues. These issues have taken on a new level of importance with the rushed confirmation of the new U.S. Supreme Court Justice. On the line are _Obergefell _(which granted marriage equality), the legality of the ACA (covering pre-existing conditions and healthcare to millions, and _ Roe v. Wade_ (women's right to choose). My opponent is celebrating Amy Coney Barrett's appointment to the Court - he knows what it means on these critical issues.
If the Supreme Court overturns these decisions, state laws are the way we can protect Ohioans. It is more important than ever for you to invest in state races and candidates like me who will always fight to protect our families and our neighbors.
**[As we continue to fight big money attacks from the other side, please chip in $20, or whatever you can, to join our grassroots movement and get our message to voters before election day. Click here to make a contribution.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/F-RgklHmD6f6qGcitPYxgxSUYoh_ZX9hJVSuleyX3KI=?refcode=10.27&amount=20) **_And please forward to any friends or family who are still making decisions!_
Thanks so much.
Sincerely,
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Betsy** **
Date: Monday, Oct 26, 2020
Subject: Where we stand on the issues
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
| | | |
---
---
There's a stark difference between my opponent and me on the key issues facing Ohioans, and everyone should know where we stand. Take a look, then please share with 5 friends, neighbors, or relatives, who may still be undecided. For citations and more information on my opponent's views you can visit [www.jerrycirinoextreme.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/3Yug-ocHSCIhDNZKKtoqfdLFEUqAUUpTPf-yjJNAwSM=) and his [iVoterGuide Profile](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/LyJhs0RWla8DoIjv7rVg186nfKR3l8vtFZ5GO0poj8M=?elecK=766&raceK=8379&primarypartyk=-&canK=48649). Please share and contribute if you can._ Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/O0QeAhXeBQR26P9--RPIjc0a5-j51I8dlHmlVI6Hlr0=?refcode=10.26&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/O0QeAhXeBQR26P9--RPIjc0a5-j51I8dlHmlVI6Hlr0=?refcode=10.26&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/O0QeAhXeBQR26P9--RPIjc0a5-j51I8dlHmlVI6Hlr0=?refcode=10.26&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/O0QeAhXeBQR26P9--RPIjc0a5-j51I8dlHmlVI6Hlr0=?refcode=10.26&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/O0QeAhXeBQR26P9--RPIjc0a5-j51I8dlHmlVI6Hlr0=?refcode=10.26) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/ZmQe2LLsZMLZ4drroc2m7KyF46x4iHIzxpD0vyFS_y0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/9l-zmAKVVL_NiN9lrQuTlnPBk1Rg3dHHwBLwbIGzlPQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/iRUBimesL51j0ykmV4ThiRd-SFJq6RE_12b0wC1Uolk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z9eOwX2ZaEWbZ16h9nZo6gPj9us3PClYIcRIbBb6j5I=/0BWKBWCxHtlN-oo8TrKxYr0ZaNVN0AreuU1FOBzSdLQ=)

**We absolutely cannot afford to lose Joni 's strong voice and leadership in the Senate this year.** As the first female combat veteran to serve in the U.S. Senate, Joni brings 23 years of experience serving in the Iowa Army National Guard and the U.S. Army Reserve to the table in Washington. She is the strong voice Iowans need to continue fighting for our veterans, Iowa's farmers, and to reduce Washington's wasteful spending.

I'm proud to stand with Joni as she fights every day to protect our Conservative values in Iowa and in the Senate. **Let Joni know that you 're with her in this fight too. [Chip in $50, $25, or even $10 today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x9YOuZMQ9YKH0otlLyPZ8cBe7BBQRkV9mobAqUJ9_brthZnDkqjlceAmXqxhFNdI7eD24Y-cl7NFCp3w20FAgR8GRLI2T-Aes3ATySezqP8D3glEYRfchK9ytIKzlEfQgR5ZON3N9xIv0RpTsZVyC2DjV1pTy6M9u6giABkOzSv0cf-i-wPtu1JNX3QKL8xAb0rgr7heLf_hw-bxj9YDBe7cGIF72t6f_UYJoohpkKK4ADACRvMwFVbeoqpk6MzSZCuUpS7jR7I-vvwZW5MgpsmcglbJkK7zzDtemZj8B1MjBMhLrMkA4nw-KuAJj8db66HbMuMYqKodCBCLwHMCaYp-9IK7oACGYK4uFhseT-Z1cFHgR4frZt0imRV8ls0c9Cjwj3m9j2dAV4EIullrzN7MiBMF1bVccK91fmYJEVP8Qu49x6H8lsNAFp9p2bXC&c=AN99it8qz7s4jTvsGo9ljqbfnrraiGnBiLs_O_n2ZDl9VY78DmOVWw==&ch=SZTxKXApBu5BtjD2sSzaY5No1EgFjEIjAhrGnZixZsY5-zrMY8svDA==)**

There's a lot at stake in this election. We've heard all about the Left's socialist ideas for our country --_their $93 trillion Green New Deal, pro-abortion policies, and their Medicare-for-All plan_ \-- and if we lose Iowa's Senate seat this year, those ideas could become reality.

**Now, it 's more important than ever that we protect Iowa's Senate seat.**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: why I got into this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
As a combat veteran and working mom, I understand the challenges Texas families deal with every single day.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37aa/403962407/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

As we're entering the final week of this campaign, I wanted to reflect a little bit on why I decided to get into this race in the first place. As a combat veteran and working mom, I understand the challenges Texas families deal with every single day. And it was clear to me that Sen. Cornyn doesn't.

[**If you're already with me, you can help power us through this final week by making a donation of any amount you can afford right here.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37a9/403962407/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__&amount=10")

It's no surprise that Sen. Cornyn votes the way he does when you look at who's funding his campaign. Over nearly 20 years in Washington, he's accepted enormous amounts of money from special interests like the insurance industry, Big Pharma, and the private detention industry.

So frankly, it's no wonder he championed the repeal of the Affordable Care Act, watered down drug pricing legislation, and blocked bipartisan immigration reform bills. Those votes may not serve Texans' interests, but they sure do help Sen. Cornyn's big donors.

When it comes down to it, _that's_ why I decided to run. Texans need a senator who will fight for our families -- meaning expanding health care with a public option for everyone who wants it, lowering prescription drug costs, and finally making sure DREAMers have a pathway to citizenship in the only country they've ever known.

As Texas' next senator, I'll _always_ put working families first -- because my family _is_ one of those families. But Sen. Cornyn and his donors aren't going to give up easily. They're spending millions on misleading ads, trying to scare Texans into re-electing him. And I need your help to fight back.

**So Peter, please make a donation to help us keep going in this final week. Every dollar makes a big difference and helps us keep reaching voters and making sure they cast their ballots.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37a8/403962407/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37af/403962407/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37ae/403962407/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37ad/403962407/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37ac/403962407/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__")**
Thanks,

MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37a9/403962407/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201027.1nd__2408__&amount=10")

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37a3/403962407/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2408&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891de5/7f51f7bc/5958dc23/4efb37a2/403962407/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: The Deadline for Mail-in Ballot Applications is TODAY!!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.165841.aspx)
Dear Peter,
This is the most critical election of our lifetimes, so please make a plan to vote and take a few friends with you! Most counties have the polling precincts posted on their county websites - please make sure your precinct hasn't changed! It is important that we encourage everyone we know to vote on November 3rd!
If you plan on voting by mail-in, **THE DEADLINE TO APPLY IS TODAY** , Tuesday, October 27th, you can apply for your mail-ballot [here](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/49.165841.aspx)!
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.165841.aspx)

Your contributions are greatly appreciated!
**[www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.165841.aspx)**

name: Mike Thompson
subject: if we all vote…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I know I’ve said this before but I’ll say it again: **_This is the most important election of our lifetime._**

We’re only _one week_ away from Election Day and it’s all on the line. Ballots have dropped all across California and voters are already casting their ballots. **We need everyone to show up and vote in this election.**

**That’s why I’m emailing you to make sure you have everything you need to cast your ballot!** [**_Click here to find up-to-date information about early voting, locate your polling location, or prepare to vote by mail →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20839253/258551686/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRmM2Y1Zi03MjE4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z36AKlwBSWwQNfA_l4eBrD4wPItRmQ16Ke5ePa7Awtc=&emci=1331efd4-6918-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6fdf3f5f-7218-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)
**[VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20839255/258551688/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRmM2Y1Zi03MjE4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z36AKlwBSWwQNfA_l4eBrD4wPItRmQ16Ke5ePa7Awtc=&emci=1331efd4-6918-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6fdf3f5f-7218-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)**
This is our chance to make our voices heard at the ballot box and to elect Democrats up and down the ticket. But we need everyone to show up to make this happen.

So let’s go out and vote — and then let’s tell our friends, family, and neighbors to do the same.

subject: One Week
body:
We have 7 days until this election cycle comes to a close. One week. We have to make it count. I am in this race fighting for better representation. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8f99a55702c1/one-week?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We have 7 days until this election cycle comes to a close. One week. We have to make it count.

I am in this race fighting for better representation. Right now, the Illinois 16th has a Congressman who wants to repeal Roe v. Wade, rollback environmental protections, and cut taxes for the wealthy at the expense of working and middle class families. He champions a dangerous trade war that has hurt our farmers and has voted against preexisting conditions every chance he gets. He is literally one of the most anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ members of the House.

The women, LGBTQ folks, farmers, working families, and people with preexisting conditions of IL-16 have had a representative who simply does not care about them. **That is why I am running.
**
This next week will prove critical in our win. [Can I count on you to chip in and help us get across the finish line?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b73cc415a3&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Team Warner
subject: one week away.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Election Day is one week away. Do you have a plan to vote?
|
---

| | Dear Derek --

**_Election Day is one week away. Do you have a plan to vote?_**

Election Day is November 3rd, and Virginians are already breaking records. More Virginians cast their ballots early this year than in 2016, but we're not done yet. With more options to cast your ballot this year, it's now easier than ever to have your voice heard.

There's still time to vote early in person if you'd like -- you have until October 31st. Whether you're voting early or voting in person on Election Day, it's crucial that you have a plan to cast your ballot. Head over to **[www.iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da1b/53d9897e/55736477/1c88c310/2067074873/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")** for more information.

This election could be a crucial turning point for our country. We need to elect leaders who will navigate the COVID-19 pandemic responsibly, expand access to affordable health care, and build an economy that doesn't leave anyone behind as we transition to an increasingly digital economy. We have the power to re-elect Mark Warner and elect Democrats up and down the ticket who will keep us moving forward. It all starts with your vote. Let's continue to build on the momentum and push through this final week before the election!

Thank you for your support!

-- Team Warner

P.S. If you've already voted, THANK YOU! If you're looking to help Team Warner continue our last big push before Election Day, **[pitch in to help us reach as many voters as possible in these final seven days.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da1b/53d9897e/55736477/1c88c31f/2067074873/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-oneweek?refcode=20201027_e_1_fl__907__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
Election day is exactly one week away and America is choosing sides. There is the side of science, decency, equality and honesty. And there is the side of hate, division, racism and cheating. There is a good side and a bad side, and the WVDP is doing everything we can to make sure we end up on the good side.
As we dig into our final GOTV and voter protection efforts, an extra bit of help could really go a long way. We need to have both a digital and on the ground presence as we get closer to the finish line. Everything from transportation for poll watchers to last minute phone banking comes with a cost. It’s not a huge amount, but we’d really like to raise another $280 this week so we can have what we need.
Can you make a donation right now and help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

name: Daniel Gade
subject: re: Judge Amy Coney Barrett
body:
We MUST protect the Senate.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017au5WQ6ScjtfbAcYUKal-B4KsmiR5GjPQOkhGjgEeG6KzMNfowvCPbHciL8MIiv7GFujmcSZvhP3egsHmhBzqSaoI8bGxdrtrWy59wqDmob7HjuwdL6-kX3_KM_MfUUXwrMuIE7whSZsetKSZgJ79aXT1DVwTH8JOcpBbChtzN47TILZgKS_Uv3pWFZ0JYV0ZQ6N8G1xjl0DtWtsViTi6oeGJmE-Tovub1-sh3aQrCk4LcEB5ONvqJI83NLKj-MKSDgN2Mu6mnvU9DNyh11zmdzhBJgzkz4uMWfs00CoT8n8FS9_oVjVyf9_fekY6_ti&c=izYfmEe1hzgaufHekekr794V87gbO6YBeuKGaAWV97vQeItFdSAwqQ==&ch=YKkpuIcIr9Gsv-0lEi9E3M0RSwUARKd_I4Iib8u9pjc0FY8eYfhsMg==)
---
Friend,
---
The historic vote to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett was yet another example of how critical it is to maintain our conservative Senate majority on November 3.
---

Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

body:
I will leave nothing on the table.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AWLRMdnkPRyE0TqCKoJlE8SpKh4FqWDY0NzXNAUbZJGo8fpZuE0IBTJnxj5L5XTCufcB2HCDYsMhgfZMdYWOr3q4NU0vCRcew_toRlUaINvt0p9LRsudHTtFCNzyK0RrQU7PPcLDacIwFCD0LprTKKDl9g-rORtsIu6d3R5MpGLttLW-zhVIdpH4vossG-MyBaa1RgM_ZlCh7pp1IxyjjPRETYcdYElK9LYe9iQd0IfRBYsQa81s_FcdxyntvOabque2W8c8LvbaVCTjOfx9njGtzEirRwTl5WSBYfJqvQTWnWqba2ULJw==&c=0LhLyVjnIMBPVzXKOz9qpkBK89sCx-C3-vbgQ0hGNw9B9fLTUSSwzw==&ch=VAlOamg0VH8d66p_TuO6Ar1M3_6bL80tvV3vfNj86aoePgx8ntGS0w==)

Friend,
---
As a U.S. Army Captain, I put my heart and soul into every mission in my life.
---
So, with exactly one week left, I promise you that I will go ALL IN to succeed in _our_ mission to take back this congressional district that the Democrats bought in 2018.
---
_I never want to look back and wish I had done more to defeat the anti-police, anti-energy Democrats and stand up for the good people of Texas._
---
**Now that our race is statistically tied, we cannot leave anything to chance.**
---
_If we lose, I would hate to wonder what would 've happened if I had only reached out to you just one more time, which is why I have to ask you today for a contribution to fund our final ad blitz and field program for the FINAL WEEK._
---
But because I've asked a lot of you, I'm going to unlock a 4X-MATCH for the next 25 minutes.
---
[**Please make a contribution for the FINAL WEEK of the election to TAKE THE LEAD in this Texas bellwether race that will decide who controls the House majority.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AWLRMdnkPRyE0TqCKoJlE8SpKh4FqWDY0NzXNAUbZJGo8fpZuE0IBTJnxj5L5XTCufcB2HCDYsMhgfZMdYWOr3q4NU0vCRcew_toRlUaINvt0p9LRsudHTtFCNzyK0RrQU7PPcLDacIwFCD0LprTKKDl9g-rORtsIu6d3R5MpGLttLW-zhVIdpH4vossG-MyBaa1RgM_ZlCh7pp1IxyjjPRETYcdYElK9LYe9iQd0IfRBYsQa81s_FcdxyntvOabque2W8c8LvbaVCTjOfx9njGtzEirRwTl5WSBYfJqvQTWnWqba2ULJw==&c=0LhLyVjnIMBPVzXKOz9qpkBK89sCx-C3-vbgQ0hGNw9B9fLTUSSwzw==&ch=VAlOamg0VH8d66p_TuO6Ar1M3_6bL80tvV3vfNj86aoePgx8ntGS0w==)

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AWLRMdnkPRyE0TqCKoJlE8SpKh4FqWDY0NzXNAUbZJGo8fpZuE0IBTJnxj5L5XTCufcB2HCDYsMhgfZMdYWOr3q4NU0vCRcew_toRlUaINvt0p9LRsudHTtFCNzyK0RrQU7PPcLDacIwFCD0LprTKKDl9g-rORtsIu6d3R5MpGLttLW-zhVIdpH4vossG-MyBaa1RgM_ZlCh7pp1IxyjjPRETYcdYElK9LYe9iQd0IfRBYsQa81s_FcdxyntvOabque2W8c8LvbaVCTjOfx9njGtzEirRwTl5WSBYfJqvQTWnWqba2ULJw==&c=0LhLyVjnIMBPVzXKOz9qpkBK89sCx-C3-vbgQ0hGNw9B9fLTUSSwzw==&ch=VAlOamg0VH8d66p_TuO6Ar1M3_6bL80tvV3vfNj86aoePgx8ntGS0w==)**

Since my days at West Point, I've never settled for just "going through the motions."
---
Everything I do -- from writing this email to talking to Texas voters on the ground -- I give 100% because I believe in our mission to defend this great country and the American Dream.
---
When I see Democrats like Nancy Pelosi putting their partisan politics ahead of our citizens, it fuels the fire under me to stop them from abusing their power at the expense of the American people.
---
_But what really aggravated me was seeing our current representative -- Lizzie Fletcher -- fail to show up for our debate._
---
_**She sent a message to every single one of her constituents that she lacks either the courage or the respect to hear what voters have to say.**_
---
That's not how things are done in the Army -- and that's certainly not how things are done in Texas.
---
_As Texans, we have the courage and the decency to answer tough questions and be held to account._
---
Friend: I promise you that's how I'll lead in Congress. But I'll need your help winning this race to get there.

Thank you,

Team Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_nEpccl4bHiBZByDb7IkRbo0O9xxYNw7yhghv-jguPsHWm6NJYr8ZCXSygsHHmi8spZdj6pCo2oyBHiLgF4L1gP2rx-aPIA8EmYTn452W5fjX5fyxoiDKiA271-0B8D_vHE-LyvfmMaliwmYebx2FrMk-ZR7I6acIrnOCrYOb8=&c=3yAlu0HQ1YMgUDSJkmMgtj53wTwJfpP03pQFJnC_h8EqDQfJ8LQcaQ==&ch=rw8JO5kq9Cesb_-5FeaBtU-o14eEKb9kc05gXH5d9D8wJWLJGBAhgQ==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_nEpccl4bHiBZByDb7IkRbo0O9xxYNw7yhghv-jguPsHWm6NJYr8X2n0Uzqy5G-wUxI5ykzFFeNPne4vSO4lrIKXJfP0-iPJ6XqE0bSiZNhDD_AD4hWkRBUc7F-ucw-lkbyj3_ER5ZHqKUk3T7yO1gFqnT9-sm_&c=3yAlu0HQ1YMgUDSJkmMgtj53wTwJfpP03pQFJnC_h8EqDQfJ8LQcaQ==&ch=rw8JO5kq9Cesb_-5FeaBtU-o14eEKb9kc05gXH5d9D8wJWLJGBAhgQ==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_nEpccl4bHiBZByDb7IkRbo0O9xxYNw7yhghv-jguPsHWm6NJYr8ZCXSygsHHmiR9IH9qDJLkNLyXq4DzOmlIEH8X34hgOQeP2DlAzP1YHo14b3H-RhW8pGbd9inLSePsGNdWcqOHwGeFm71a4dNRZC_oQk7x-YsiwDFRDPO_b-4Dhhipv0Bw==&c=3yAlu0HQ1YMgUDSJkmMgtj53wTwJfpP03pQFJnC_h8EqDQfJ8LQcaQ==&ch=rw8JO5kq9Cesb_-5FeaBtU-o14eEKb9kc05gXH5d9D8wJWLJGBAhgQ==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_nEpccl4bHiBZByDb7IkRbo0O9xxYNw7yhghv-jguPsHWm6NJYr8W7oVcugpYdT6J5GCDSh4GUJxU6dM5agt6TNgoAlsp0NNp293Vq9mWL3Xz69jtx9-fne2KLYviesXkr0-KRYAVVoOMv6P3fTbSL6R8Q7F4diwG-c-8qvB3vdfEY73pw5_f3shS1PaHs0HoXn_iUfO823PxqRx94D8-GBGFt0m4If0f9-l6xmpwMsKpBOTFeg2RNUBzNhU1Z2HpXIYF6T4sr_cvqyzCuCdqVAflwjKYv0zJipucBmEq3arjK9NdJlYg==&c=3yAlu0HQ1YMgUDSJkmMgtj53wTwJfpP03pQFJnC_h8EqDQfJ8LQcaQ==&ch=rw8JO5kq9Cesb_-5FeaBtU-o14eEKb9kc05gXH5d9D8wJWLJGBAhgQ==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on == and == that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn == up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our == and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible. | | Texans for Senator John Cornyn | PO BOX 13026, Austin, TX 78711 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

She has shown time and time again that she does not care for her constituents outside of the measure that fits perfectly into her Far-Left base.

body:
Corky is counting on you to flip this seat RED! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d0d700c9d505cc0b/90eb0620dee08987c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,
Election day is closing in. We’re just seven days away, and Corky needs your help to win in New Hampshire and flip it RED!

name: Cory Gardner iPhone
subject: Quitting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
There has been a lot of talk lately.

Friend, there has been a lot of talk lately.

The Left has raised record-breaking numbers in the tens of millions. They are flooding the TV and radio waves in Colorado with manipulative and false attack ads trying to influence people into thinking one thing when, in reality, it's not true. It is their gameplan; it always has been and always will be. It is no surprise why they want an easily persuaded and ethically questionable John Hickenlooper in office.

However, despite their smear campaigns, I will not quit. I will not quit working hard to lower taxes and healthcare costs, protecting people with pre-existing conditions. I will not quit fighting against the Left's Socialist platform. I will not quit working to bring the best job market and opportunities to Colorado, And most of all, I will not quit on the people of Colorado.

But I need your help, Friend. I need your help right now to fight back against the Left and their hunt for power. If you can chip in $5, $10, or even $25 by 11:59 tonight, it will make a significant difference in my campaign. Can you help me continue working hard for Colorado?

**[**DONATE $25 BEFORE 11:59**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Jmu0SCCZIWVQbM106EZJKrd6TxzId0X4_zz4Fj8AId6I-f8QInXSXRHolzujj37LD6cXei2uv9gtUd1nR-K_4BMRoyNxsYez2-U_brO83RWjwEdqkuzKOauhta5qj0QRp66e2fwx9AlFmNhgZouQeKN8ehSJhtogUvN1C_US6rCZS2hSaQC8ed9wiDBhHBjHfdJ0PpAj6n6e4Q_xqLFV71Sij5wWbrO1D2e7z-RDi8OyyGk7UgowR7Oo22YLisemtSZINZxP8abO0Emghw_GPObeV6DNE7ha6a22KpL40wpzQWZVhwIrldl2Sp4CD5pewjpqthE16SHnsrhjmwSgbrF9gGcAuRIylwO81CWsSb6SnzGxkyKPZGKhnh6ylu2NjACXSyr8l8Fgwfmtv4Oq0OwfDbH7_shjd-FNd0AtA0QcKFhQoutr1qYM6mArcfY&c=LZQUD46Y-nzr7BWoNtwqsLhijPOXVwXf1PqCaxVrWQfLdyRt5u8r4w==&ch=VZe6l_yJzEjfE7Ge7kY6iEG1vDNgJckjFZXURWaKVZErwdrqQkAUgw==)**

With only seven days until the election, right now is when I need your help the most. It is just enough time to continue to get my message spread across the state to ensure people know about my common-sense conservatism.

Thank you for all your support through the years, Friend. I greatly appreciate it.

-Cory

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. It’s on all of us in Central Texas to beat Pete Sessions. His 97% party-line vote and his dubious ethical record don't represent Texas.

|

We hope you saw Rick’s email from yesterday, team. It’s on all of us in Central Texas to beat Pete Sessions. His 97% party-line vote and his dubious ethical record don't represent Texas. But we’re in the final countdown to Election Day and our last end-of-month fundraising deadline is Saturday at midnight. **Rick is counting on us to raise another $10,501 before time is up.[_So, can you click here and rush a donation today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20843683/258569579/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201027EOM2_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4ODc2NC03ZTE4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=279ifMAHy6ElFC0tWu_RkHoK_YJ9zzPnFoYYl2MOWRo=)** | | **[Chip in now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20843684/258569580/-1907457921?amp;fl_email_fr_20201027EOM2_TK_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4ODc2NC03ZTE4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=279ifMAHy6ElFC0tWu_RkHoK_YJ9zzPnFoYYl2MOWRo=)**

Thank you,
Team Kennedy
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Rick Kennedy
Date: October 26, 2020
Subject: One last time...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20843685/258569581/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201027EOM2_TK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4ODc2NC03ZTE4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=279ifMAHy6ElFC0tWu_RkHoK_YJ9zzPnFoYYl2MOWRo=)
In just eight days this election will be over, friends.
Before I go any further, I want to let you know it’s been a privilege to work for Central Texas and my community.
This is normally a safe Republican seat. But, through the hard work of my staff, supporters, and Democrats around the district, we’ve made this a real horse race. And no matter the result we’ve accomplished something amazing.
But I’m not going to be satisfied unless we win, and I’m doing everything in my power to get us across the finish line.
**So, for one last time, I’m setting an end-of-month goal to raise $12,000 before midnight on Saturday.[_Can I count on you to chip in anything you can right now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20843686/258569582/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201027EOM2_TK_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4ODc2NC03ZTE4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=279ifMAHy6ElFC0tWu_RkHoK_YJ9zzPnFoYYl2MOWRo=)**

_**That is why I need your immediate help.**_ There are only 7 days left before the fate of the United States Senate is decided. I need you now to finish the fight strong. Friend \- did you know?

It’s hard to believe, but my team sent you this email (see below) almost a month ago. As I’m writing this email, we’re officially _one week away_ from Election Day.

My race is coming down to the wire, and every single vote is going to matter on Election Day. Too many deadlines, too many websites, not enough clarity. So, here:

**Are you voting absentee? Make sure you return your ballot before 5 PM on Monday, November 2! **

**Voting in person? Find your precinct here:** **[https://nancymace.org/absentee-voting](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=9a3c715a9d9d4278816f139c90ebf66c&_e=-3PYxzNGZB-HJs_DgF9LI1wiR3rxJNWC-qv0TYJh3cNWQxsAWCyY36a8S6XH4MI8ldiPzCFYTg6LHqbA5_ZBhENkL6RlWRvbvTCSnZ8KiIWEa7-aHJU78yz30KHz5LK3FhDivJvXxArg9h1aX-qpOLMeHEEzgzoT-HsYKxThvhU5MUlK7If0uHsUJifRtMZb7YC4heKggLwRppqyx-OiBYvvivukDIawdETHmX141g_fdPVRU-t-fDZjX3idoQYHh_ppZTwuQaYIVp4DUAaSJScN5tLU7ecWNwQ2kfuNmR_rXbhsuSkPPWtaq1yr9LGv0Bb81VwM6qm2OiPNyWw2t5EkVcacPc2gQABOB7gt954iyNHRIJ0wWgFtW4X-bcWXWXuHyqBztmpuvHXQLXugb-e4tp6D9RyAXnht5niNRvLyweqK6WGTL4qUF6fH1WvjMfTZlY5f-6TqbovPqkERVA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

**We’re less than 30 days from Election Day.**

We’re reaching out to make sure you have a voting plan in place. We know that a lot of people are considering different ways to vote due to COVID-19 and we wanted to make sure you had all the resources you need.

_In-person absentee voting starts today,_ but if you want to vote by mail there isn’t much time left! You can still apply for an absentee ballot **but your application must be received by October 24th.**

clean_body: My race is coming down to the wire, and every single vote is going to matter on Election Day. | | Friend \- did you know? It’s hard to believe, but my team sent you this email (see below) almost a month ago. As I’m writing this email, we’re officially one week away from Election Day. My race is coming down to the wire, and every single vote is going to matter on Election Day. Too many deadlines, too many websites, not enough clarity. So, here: Are you voting absentee? Make sure you return your ballot before 5 PM on Monday, November 2! Voting in person? Find your precinct here: I’m counting on you to make your voice heard at the ballot box, so please make sure you use the resources in this email to make a voting plan! Thank you for your support, Nancy Mace P.S. If you’ve already voted and want to keep supporting my campaign, rush a donation here: \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Team Mace Subject: do you have a voting plan? To: \\ Friend \- did you know? We’re less than 30 days from Election Day. We’re reaching out to make sure you have a voting plan in place. We know that a lot of people are considering different ways to vote due to COVID-19 and we wanted to make sure you had all the resources you need. In-person absentee voting starts today, but if you want to vote by mail there isn’t much time left! You can still apply for an absentee ballot but your application must be received by October 24th. TEAM NANCY MACE ACTION CENTER We’re counting on you to help push our campaign across the finish line on Election Day! We have the best grassroots community in America, and we know that you’ll come through for us. Thank you for your support, Team Mace | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

I have both DeFazio and the Democrat powerbrokers in Washington running scared – they know that if Peter loses on Election Day, **they won’t have a point person to direct trillions in new spending that progressives have on their wish list for next year**.
