| Dear Fellow American,

**_Plain and simple, the Left is trying to steal the 2020 elections_** ...but Judicial Watch has exposed their strategies and we're stopping them cold in federal court!
In fact, Judicial Watch has arguably done more to preserve honest elections in the last few years than the Department of Justice has in the last few decades! This includes winning historic "accurate voter roll" successes in **Ohio,** **Indiana,** **Kentucky** and **California.** And we are currently suing **North Carolina, Pennsylvania** and**Colorado** over their failure to follow federal laws requiring states to clean their voter rolls between elections.
**_Our lawyers are fully prepared to move forcefully on Election Day and thereafter to challenge voter fraud in every form_** , which is why I'm asking you to join our fight by **_[making a tax-deductible gift to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51877&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjcxNDM1NTQ=)_**.

_America_ needs our expert legal team whose entire commitment is to uphold our election laws, keep our elections honest ... _and make sure that only eligible voters decide who wins and who loses_.
**And right now, that is Judicial Watch 's job one!**
So please, **_[join our fight by making your best tax-deductible contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51877&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjcxNDM1NTQ=)_** to support our work.

**_[I'm counting on you to help today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51877&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjcxNDM1NTQ=)_**
The 2020 elections promise to be a knockdown, drag-out fight to the very end. Your gift will help thwart the Left's efforts to corrupt our elections and support all of our work. name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Sylvester?=
subject: To educators and staff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| By now, most of you are aware of this year’s school board race and my candidacy to fill this seat. Had you asked me twenty years ago to run for office, I’d have passed for a whole list of reasons, but I am old enough to know - never say never. As you know, this position will be formulating policy that will impact our classrooms over the next six years. My intentions are not to brag on my experience that makes me qualified, but to communicate why I feel compelled to fill this seat and what I bring to the table to help take DCS to the next level.
For those that don’t know me well, I am 59 years old and was born in Laurel Mississippi. I didn’t go directly to college after high school. I was a CDL driver for an oil drilling company in south Mississippi. It didn’t take long until I realized that I wanted something different for my life and enrolled in Jones County Jr. College in Ellisville, MS. It was here I earned my A.A., then transferred to Ole Miss where I earned my B.A. in biology, M.S. in biology and M.Ed. in educational leadership. While at Ole Miss, I got really lucky and met my wife of 32 years. Pat and I started our family of two children and began my teaching career for Oxford City Schools and the Department of Biology at Ole Miss.
Having a desire to learn more and further my education, I enrolled at University of Memphis for their doctorate program. While there, I served as the Leadership Evaluator of Assistant Principals. My family and I then moved to DeSoto County while completing my doctoral degree in educational leadership. After my PhD, I was a professor at St. Joseph School of Nursing and a professor of biology at NWCC – DeSoto Center – where I retired after 25 years. About fifteen years ago, I began working as an Adjunct Professor for Belhaven University’s Graduate School of Education where I currently teach graduate courses.
I am proud to have served in various leadership positions while at Northwest Mississippi Community College. This included Dean of the Evening College, Chair of Natural Science, Chair of the SACS Natural Science Review Committee, and Member of the SACS Substantive Change Committee. I was elected by my peers as the President of the Faculty Senate for ten consecutive years and also elected President of the State Faculty Senate.
I believe the Administration exists to support the faculty and the faculty and staff exist to support the students – some of which are their own. Many of our faculty have student children and know the struggles of teaching their classroom children and their own. I was there not too long ago, and I know the support you need to be your best.
I don’t believe in helping one group at the expense of another. Instead, I’ve always believed we should help all individuals and give back to our communities. That is why I have served on the boards of the March of Dimes, American Heart Association, Life Blood, and currently serve as the Vice President of the Board of Directors for Disability Rights Mississippi – the enforcement wing of the ADA in Mississippi.
My years teaching traditional, hybrid, and online courses affords me the ability to understand the new and burdensome tasks we face during the most challenging times of our careers. In fact, my dissertation compared the success rates between online, hybrid and traditional instruction, how to navigate through alternate learning platforms that are necessary for our children to reach their full potential and give our teachers the right tools to do their jobs with minimal frustration.
That’s a long way of saying, I’m not seeking this position for the whopping pay of $67.00 a meeting or to climb the political ladder. I am running because I truly believe I have a skill set that I hope to parlay into something useful on our school board for both the students and faculty. Which, in my opinion, would be the best thing I could hope to do for my community.
Thank you for taking time to read my letter and your consideration when you cast your ballot this November. If there is ever anything I can do for you, please do not hesitate to reach out to me.
Best personal regards, Dr. Larry Sylvester
---

Hey friend –

I can hardly believe it, but we are just one week out from Election Day.
**[Help me make it across the finish line. Click here to rush in a $10 donation to my campaign right now.>>>](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=03a899d77fbb4140979a3fb4cab35a62&_e=ZXVVg628N9yZ6IVnFjoR4C-2qmSFrkdl1CbZ94NWLaD1uU7bx8-ojZVC6ABkTtoHcJ6gItw8U8CQ0PwnHYmbGC6s79jEo7YGqsfMbJfdxXTdoTt8iqYCRFJxWCYFxjJLfu0-Gso3Vtfx4yruEkPNcZZk51oxK8gC-sUxrF8pfvjwPXoXyl_ycK_xdWY8IoSW3N9QbG0TfTPaQWnUVrMQnzpSoecCMU9NcisE5lbAc3u87WUqrEnWvjUKh3DVb-ZTJQRG_jYbq3RtMUtgnar1Mc8q-zrHUnfCqkwJ8VKCUHZMYkZUfbOrL5aJDwKGjYur6AK5c1rXCUpCvEfEXqvWSJlVfxvWu68XEgYwkHcRW4Ok1mpxPLzee93dQ7jhpA1RekGXorfOuzZQxhI1XEszd0JpvGp2ajVgKVlFOF6BFasG7zrASx8VR4S3JFGfn6wAfyt4vPPnemRXbbp67w9fLtb-sbKQy7b8S9rFZ_Wy9OOl3-ifd0XoRVg9jXUFNavg)**
So much has happened since I launched this campaign in January:
* China created a global health emergency that has killed more than 200,000 people here in the U.S.
* Thousands of small businesses were forced to close and millions of hard working Americans lost their jobs
* Violent riots broke out across the country and countless police officers were killed or wounded in the line of duty

We learned just how badly we need strong leaders in Washington who will help get us through tough times so we come out stronger on the other side. **And Chris Pappas proved time and again this year that he isn’t cut out to be one of those leaders.**

**FIRST** he refused to hold China accountable for the lives lost and economies destroyed by COVID-19.

**NEXT** he turned his back on small business owners and working families across New Hampshire by holding relief funds hostage and voting to give the money they so desperately needed to illegal immigrants.

**AFTER THAT** as peaceful protests turned into violent riots, he sided with angry mobs instead of our law enforcement community, and even voted to allow criminals to sue cops for doing their jobs.

**THEN** during the middle of a televised debate, he blatantly denied having a relationship with a corporate lobbyist, but later admitted that he was lying about it the whole time.

All of that makes me sad. It makes me angry. And it makes me more determined than ever to beat him.

**But here’s the honest truth, friend - I’m going to need your help more than ever this week to make that happen.**

**Will you join my Donation Drive by donating $10 today and pledging to donate another $10 before our big FEC filing deadline on the 31st?**

clean_body: The election is just one week away. Here’s why that means we have to work harder than ever. | | | Hey friend – I can hardly believe it, but we are just one week out from Election Day. So much has happened since I launched this campaign in January: China created a global health emergency that has killed more than 200,000 people here in the U.S. Thousands of small businesses were forced to close and millions of hard working Americans lost their jobs Violent riots broke out across the country and countless police officers were killed or wounded in the line of duty We learned just how badly we need strong leaders in Washington who will help get us through tough times so we come out stronger on the other side. And Chris Pappas proved time and again this year that he isn’t cut out to be one of those leaders. FIRST he refused to hold China accountable for the lives lost and economies destroyed by COVID-19. NEXT he turned his back on small business owners and working families across New Hampshire by holding relief funds hostage and voting to give the money they so desperately needed to illegal immigrants. AFTER THAT as peaceful protests turned into violent riots, he sided with angry mobs instead of our law enforcement community, and even voted to allow criminals to sue cops for doing their jobs. THEN during the middle of a televised debate, he blatantly denied having a relationship with a corporate lobbyist, but later admitted that he was lying about it the whole time. All of that makes me sad. It makes me angry. And it makes me more determined than ever to beat him. But here’s the honest truth, friend - I’m going to need your help more than ever this week to make that happen. Will you join my Donation Drive by donating $10 today and pledging to donate another $10 before our big FEC filing deadline on the 31st? | These next 7 days are the most crucial days of the entire campaign. If you are able, please join the Donation Drive or make a one-time donation of any amount at this secure link: ** Thank you for supporting me every step of this campaign, friend. \- Matt | While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. Will you chip in to help him fight back against the Left? | | | | | Paid for by Mowers for Congress | | P.O. Box 10297, Bedford, N.H. 03110 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Nikki Haley
subject: We need Term Limits Now
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ry9WVYqCKj6cQiZEfdZTbQLlgBgdOl2W9tW7I2socW5-Cnz72a8t6-wj-K5fDriCwZZQ-gJqcqpoO5PT01OZxTXaTPzIxNL1_lVgvnlr2xfDI6nQNQ3ZcFXZWN4J_VQeM2kyD2MjFbaAxlCAS8aIDnRPPg-ozZhSwbjM4g1cEH2xyvpcMhZ0dCyZ4MW5zvLNI3drFSoe_eW3mUGpTe539v8rox-nHELnqHHOw8rsdm5al0BuKk-AmVG8yX8n8xrlrcL3E0yajBU40J-NonubA9nlXxuMU6E&c=IeS-SBRlqzhgWePKkfxbTF7Gm71rULZr2NO0cpovSvB_KZIh_YLAPw==&ch=IGp__EgOqrPxI6_bDMnYX-mfxQwbgiU-ppEbr1nmSRxhGjg5-36tSQ==) Fellow Conservative ---

**D+26 ... D+29... D+32...** These numbers show just how lopsided the districts that belong to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (Queens, NY), Ilhan Omar (Minneapolis, MN) and Rashida Tlaib (Detroit, MI) are --- three of the most extreme liberals in the U.S. House of Representatives. These are some of the most lopsided congressional districts in America -- which means these three could be in Congress for decades, just like ... **Nancy Pelosi (D+37 - 32 years in office)
Maxine Waters (D+29 - 28 years in office)
Adam Schiff (D+23 - 18 years in office)** Our Founders never intended to have lifetime elected officials.
Our first president, George Washington, had the foresight, respect, and humility to term-limit himself!
But that same foresight, respect, and humility is rare in politicians and Washington insiders today. [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ry9WVYqCKj6cQiZEfdZTbQLlgBgdOl2W9tW7I2socW5-Cnz72a8t6-wj-K5fDriCwZZQ-gJqcqpoO5PT01OZxTXaTPzIxNL1_lVgvnlr2xfDI6nQNQ3ZcFXZWN4J_VQeM2kyD2MjFbaAxlCAS8aIDnRPPg-ozZhSwbjM4g1cEH2xyvpcMhZ0dCyZ4MW5zvLNI3drFSoe_eW3mUGpTe539v8rox-nHELnqHHOw8rsdm5al0BuKk-AmVG8yX8n8xrlrcL3E0yajBU40J-NonubA9nlXxuMU6E&c=IeS-SBRlqzhgWePKkfxbTF7Gm71rULZr2NO0cpovSvB_KZIh_YLAPw==&ch=IGp__EgOqrPxI6_bDMnYX-mfxQwbgiU-ppEbr1nmSRxhGjg5-36tSQ==) Ilhan Omar (MN-05) **D+26** [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ry9WVYqCKj6cQiZEfdZTbQLlgBgdOl2W9tW7I2socW5-Cnz72a8t6-wj-K5fDriCwZZQ-gJqcqpoO5PT01OZxTXaTPzIxNL1_lVgvnlr2xfDI6nQNQ3ZcFXZWN4J_VQeM2kyD2MjFbaAxlCAS8aIDnRPPg-ozZhSwbjM4g1cEH2xyvpcMhZ0dCyZ4MW5zvLNI3drFSoe_eW3mUGpTe539v8rox-nHELnqHHOw8rsdm5al0BuKk-AmVG8yX8n8xrlrcL3E0yajBU40J-NonubA9nlXxuMU6E&c=IeS-SBRlqzhgWePKkfxbTF7Gm71rULZr2NO0cpovSvB_KZIh_YLAPw==&ch=IGp__EgOqrPxI6_bDMnYX-mfxQwbgiU-ppEbr1nmSRxhGjg5-36tSQ==) Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (NY-14) **D+29** [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ry9WVYqCKj6cQiZEfdZTbQLlgBgdOl2W9tW7I2socW5-Cnz72a8t6-wj-K5fDriCwZZQ-gJqcqpoO5PT01OZxTXaTPzIxNL1_lVgvnlr2xfDI6nQNQ3ZcFXZWN4J_VQeM2kyD2MjFbaAxlCAS8aIDnRPPg-ozZhSwbjM4g1cEH2xyvpcMhZ0dCyZ4MW5zvLNI3drFSoe_eW3mUGpTe539v8rox-nHELnqHHOw8rsdm5al0BuKk-AmVG8yX8n8xrlrcL3E0yajBU40J-NonubA9nlXxuMU6E&c=IeS-SBRlqzhgWePKkfxbTF7Gm71rULZr2NO0cpovSvB_KZIh_YLAPw==&ch=IGp__EgOqrPxI6_bDMnYX-mfxQwbgiU-ppEbr1nmSRxhGjg5-36tSQ==) Rashida Tlaib (MI-13) **D+32** They think they know better than folks like you and me - and they think it's their job to TELL US what to do instead of the other way around. But we don't work for them - they work for us. And it's up to patriots like you and me to hold our elected officials accountable - which is why we need an amendment to the Constitution to establish TERM LIMITS NOW. Pelosi, Waters, Schiff, and other career politicians have done decades worth of damage. But right now, you and I can stop this new class of extreme leftists from inflicting socialist policies like the "Green New Deal" or "Medicare for All" that will lead to decades more damage. And their willingness to exploit the national coronavirus crisis is proof-positive of why it's more important than ever to term limit these politicians. This is exactly why I launched STAND FOR AMERICA: to demand accountability from our elected officials and demand policies that strengthen America's economy, culture, and national security. **Will you join me? And, what 's more, will you join President Trump, who sees term limits as necessary to "drain the swamp" in Washington?** **[You can start by contributing $45 right now to Stand For America. Your generous donation will be used to counter the liberal elitists fighting against TERM LIMITS in the news, online, and on the air.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ry9WVYqCKj6cQiZEfdZTbQLlgBgdOl2W9tW7I2socW5-Cnz72a8t6-wj-K5fDriCwZZQ-gJqcqpoO5PT01OZxTXaTPzIxNL1_lVgvnlr2xfDI6nQNQ3ZcFXZWN4J_VQeM2kyD2MjFbaAxlCAS8aIDnRPPg-ozZhSwbjM4g1cEH2xyvpcMhZ0dCyZ4MW5zvLNI3drFSoe_eW3mUGpTe539v8rox-nHELnqHHOw8rsdm5al0BuKk-AmVG8yX8n8xrlrcL3E0yajBU40J-NonubA9nlXxuMU6E&c=IeS-SBRlqzhgWePKkfxbTF7Gm71rULZr2NO0cpovSvB_KZIh_YLAPw==&ch=IGp__EgOqrPxI6_bDMnYX-mfxQwbgiU-ppEbr1nmSRxhGjg5-36tSQ==)** _I am sure you can guess the most vocal opponents of term limits ..._ That's right. It's the same incumbent politicians listed above, along with the special-interest groups who depend on them. And, while the approval ratings for Congress are abysmally low, nothing ever changes. No wonder. It's a simple matter of cause and effect... _**Cause: Ocasio-Cortez 's district skews D+29 (that means the district is 29 percentage points more Democrat than the national average)**_ Effect: She seeks to exploit a national emergency to push her socialist policies on our country with impunity ("Medicare for All"... the "Green New Deal"...not to mention paychecks for those unwilling to work, eliminating air travel, limiting family size). _**Cause: Omar 's district skews D+26.**_ Effect: She is completely unaccountable for her history of anti-Semitic and anti-American statements, like dismissing the 9/11 terrorist attacks as "_some people did something._ " _**Cause: Tlaib 's district skews D+32.**_ Effect: Without consequences she unleashes profanity-laced tirades against President Trump, like: _" We're gonna go in there and we're gonna impeach the mother#$%&er!"_ All this in less than ONE full term. **[A donation of $45 right now will provide our team with the resources to insist that Congress add the TERM LIMITS amendment to the Constitution.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ry9WVYqCKj6cQiZEfdZTbQLlgBgdOl2W9tW7I2socW5-Cnz72a8t6-wj-K5fDriCwZZQ-gJqcqpoO5PT01OZxTXaTPzIxNL1_lVgvnlr2xfDI6nQNQ3ZcFXZWN4J_VQeM2kyD2MjFbaAxlCAS8aIDnRPPg-ozZhSwbjM4g1cEH2xyvpcMhZ0dCyZ4MW5zvLNI3drFSoe_eW3mUGpTe539v8rox-nHELnqHHOw8rsdm5al0BuKk-AmVG8yX8n8xrlrcL3E0yajBU40J-NonubA9nlXxuMU6E&c=IeS-SBRlqzhgWePKkfxbTF7Gm71rULZr2NO0cpovSvB_KZIh_YLAPw==&ch=IGp__EgOqrPxI6_bDMnYX-mfxQwbgiU-ppEbr1nmSRxhGjg5-36tSQ==) **
Imagine how bad things will get if these extreme left politicians spend 20 or 30 years in office and they switch from _saying_ and _proposing_ extremist things to **actually writing these policies into law.** It has become common for members of Congress to stay in office for 20, 30, 40, sometimes even 50 years. When they do that, two things happen: First, they become creatures of Washington. They lose touch with the people back home and become bound to special interests that dominate the Swamp. Second, this system discourages many good people from seeking office. They know the odds are stacked against them winning an election, and even if they do win, they know they won't gain any real authority in Congress until they're there for 20 years. It's not right. Our first president, George Washington, had the foresight, respect, and humility to term-limit himself! But that same foresight, respect, and humility is rare in politicians and Washington insiders today. == Ilhan Omar (MN-05) D+26 == Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (NY-14) D+29 == Rashida Tlaib (MI-13) D+32 They think they know better than folks like you and me - and they think it's their job to TELL US what to do instead of the other way around. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Protecting Our Energy Jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

In order to bounce back from the coronavirus pandemic, we need to have the
best year of economic growth in the history of our country. And for the 7th
District, that means a robust oil and gas industry. Houston's oil and gas
industry employs more than 250,000 workers right here in Houston. And through
their hard work and ingenuity, our energy workers have made Houston a center
for innovation, entrepreneurship and prosperity. As Congressman, Wesley Hunt
will work to defend this essential industry and the quality of life it offers
millions of Texans across our state.

Unfortunately, Democrats nationwide are calling for an end to the oil and gas
industry with no viable alternatives for efficient and affordable electricity.
Now more than ever, it is vital that the 7th District sends a Representative to
Washington who will fight for our industry and the countless Houston families
it supports.

Last week, Joe Biden made it clear that Houston's energy industry will be on
the chopping block if he wins the presidency. And sadly, Lizzie Fletcher's
track record in Congress proves that she will not stand between Houston and the
dangerous policies coming out of Washington. From allowing Nancy Pelosi to deny
Houston's Energy Corridor COVID relief funding to voting to spend billions of
dollars on Green New Deal projects while Houston energy workers suffer,
Fletcher has proven she is no ally to the oil and gas industry. Unfortunately,
this is what we have come to expect from a Representative who votes 99% with
Nancy Pelosi.

Through their own initiative, energy workers in Houston have brought records
levels of efficiency and affordability to Houston's energy sector, empowering
the United States to become energy independent and simultaneously reduce our
carbon emissions. In order to continue to advance the affordability,
reliability, and efficiency of our industry, the federal government must allow
our innovators and entrepreneurs to continue to lead the way.

As your Congressman, Wesley Hunt will protect our energy jobs and work to
empower the hundreds of thousands of energy workers right here in Houston so
they can continue to bring progress, opportunity, and affordability to our
great city.

This November, the livelihoods of countless Texans will be on the ballot. We
hope you will vote for Wesley Hunt to ensure the viability of this vital
industry in the future.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=9709b72dbc8346f7a5364d23f5b0c235&_t=KPQYzATdTjE5oDqnHjqZ4jw7OhE2we55raXnaJ5f-n-0tzsCYFZXN3WF0bIlVyJ09ezOxcar1B60vUtEQk_8FF4WI2ThVKh56sVFKOkgB60LxwtJoAKqFLa1Z915KmlDVpeGBXY79uCW0UaVA0EwT-o0liHpYMuVK54FmXqcFvs%3D>
.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: What 2016 taught us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We will fight for every vote.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt) Friend, Our final fundraising deadline of this election is coming up this weekend. **[I'm going to humbly ask that you chip in $5 or whatever you can ahead of that deadline -- because it matters.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13444?t=4&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13445?t=5&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13446?t=6&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13447?t=7&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13448?t=8&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13449?t=9&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13444?t=10&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)
---
Here's why:
In October 2016, Hillary Clinton led Donald Trump by 14 points in the polls. Everyone thought it was wrapped up, over, done -- we know now how wrong we all were.
My opponent is just like Donald Trump: unpredictable, extreme, offensive. We cannot let polls, assumptions, beliefs, or anything like that lead us right now because we can never ever be sure of an election result until every vote is counted.
2016 taught us an important lesson: We run out the clock, and we fight for every vote assuming we're down 14 points. We don't take anything for granted, and we continue to fight for every single vote. That's what we're going to do this week because we shouldn't assume this race is safe.
**We set a FINAL fundraising goal of $75,000 by midnight on Halloween -- we won't be spooked out of it by anything.[Donate $5 or more right now to fight for every last vote alongside me.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13444?t=11&akid=8203%2E868730%2EWZCnzt)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: We will fight for every vote. | Friend, Our final fundraising deadline of this election is coming up this weekend. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Here's why: In October 2016, Hillary Clinton led Donald Trump by 14 points in the polls. Everyone thought it was wrapped up, over, done -- we know now how wrong we all were. My opponent is just like Donald Trump: unpredictable, extreme, offensive. We cannot let polls, assumptions, beliefs, or anything like that lead us right now because we can never ever be sure of an election result until every vote is counted. 2016 taught us an important lesson: We run out the clock, and we fight for every vote assuming we're down 14 points. We don't take anything for granted, and we continue to fight for every single vote. That's what we're going to do this week because we shouldn't assume this race is safe. We set a FINAL fundraising goal of $75,000 by midnight on Halloween -- we won't be spooked out of it by anything. Very truly yours, Jay

Friend,
---
As a U.S. Army Captain, I put my heart and soul into every mission in my life.
---
So, with exactly one week left, I promise you that I will go ALL IN to succeed in _our_ mission to take back this congressional district that the Democrats bought in 2018.
---
_I never want to look back and wish I had done more to defeat the anti-police, anti-energy Democrats and stand up for the good people of Texas._
---
**Now that our race is statistically tied, we cannot leave anything to chance.**
---
_If we lose, I would hate to wonder what would’ve happened if I had only reached out to you just one more time, which is why I have to ask you today for a contribution to fund our final ad blitz and field program for the FINAL WEEK._
---
But because I’ve asked a lot of you, I’m going to unlock a 4X-MATCH for the next 25 minutes.
---

Since my days at West Point, I’ve never settled for just “going through the motions.”
---
Everything I do -- from writing this email to talking to Texas voters on the ground -- I give 100% because I believe in our mission to defend this great country and the American Dream.
---
When I see Democrats like Nancy Pelosi putting their partisan politics ahead of our citizens, it fuels the fire under me to stop them from abusing their power at the expense of the American people.
---
_But what really aggravated me was seeing our current representative -- Lizzie Fletcher -- fail to show up for our debate._
---
_**She sent a message to every single one of her constituents that she lacks either the courage or the respect to hear what voters have to say.**_
---
That’s not how things are done in the Army -- and that’s certainly not how things are done in Texas.
---
_As Texans, we have the courage and the decency to answer tough questions and be held to account._
---

clean_body: I will leave nothing on the table. | Friend, As a U.S. Army Captain, I put my heart and soul into every mission in my life. So, with exactly one week left, I promise you that I will go ALL IN to succeed in our mission to take back this congressional district that the Democrats bought in 2018. I never want to look back and wish I had done more to defeat the anti-police, anti-energy Democrats and stand up for the good people of Texas. Now that our race is statistically tied, we cannot leave anything to chance. If we lose, I would hate to wonder what would’ve happened if I had only reached out to you just one more time, which is why I have to ask you today for a contribution to fund our final ad blitz and field program for the FINAL WEEK. But because I’ve asked a lot of you, I’m going to unlock a 4X-MATCH for the next 25 minutes. Since my days at West Point, I’ve never settled for just “going through the motions.” Everything I do -- from writing this email to talking to Texas voters on the ground -- I give 100% because I believe in our mission to defend this great country and the American Dream. When I see Democrats like Nancy Pelosi putting their partisan politics ahead of our citizens, it fuels the fire under me to stop them from abusing their power at the expense of the American people. But what really aggravated me was seeing our current representative -- Lizzie Fletcher -- fail to show up for our debate. She sent a message to every single one of her constituents that she lacks either the courage or the respect to hear what voters have to say. That’s not how things are done in the Army -- and that’s certainly not how things are done in Texas. As Texans, we have the courage and the decency to answer tough questions and be held to account. Friend: I promise you that’s how I’ll lead in Congress. But I’ll need your help winning this race to get there. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. name: Carlos Gimenez
subject: Why We Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlos Gimenez for Congress
body:
%%First Name%%, I wanted to talk to you about why I'm in this fight.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wrmOlQUvKbSMzel3JeF7P0M4aFa86Gpmo2ioBTxjkfto1Yg77Qcvfrw3G3KukNztHrpQHM9EX1yKXYJD-OX67JiPlQcLURCoODaaCbzF77ql39uIfQeYXBoFYI2akPfoi4vPknSE3yi44LsADMHkxuV60-DCe-eis4YmsYKX5b2w-ZTwRgVfOH3laI-K4lfq_XDDoozJE_XWmQp5YTillUO2SapbRkYtPBQYTGsYtpgw1BvNi_dBbpc40PZBxEAT0mPOXOry91Cck10yNmltHtr5Z1suNbrmjaJf3WdVKg6Ay5H78o5pQytAEICNoHOkf_VHR6mJRJLQuGaELJtyo2hE2KIO5Kk5r26Oz3pghh0aqyr9jLxVBV386PzpCigrQgWxX87mnssZaPnG7e4wa4SXMOkYfAtScqADHpOJbRSN8-yFkG6wEbC0evHEyj1q&c=sEIsHWry0RFBsVj3miXr40Xxsnsgix3S1h-qfZUNw-70oRk1bsW67g==&ch=QMVZNmq5f0B90I-6qj6cITg5Ig2Im6ee1u9sxDffLGj9rU2kM1pWEA==) Friend,

I'm the luckiest person in the world -- I've been privileged to serve my community my entire life. And I'm glad I've been able to give **SO MUCH BACK** to the country that I love.

As a child, I escaped Cuba with my family in search of a better life -- and we found that here in South Florida. **I raised a family,_children and grandchildren_ , and worked hard to achieve the American Dream.**

That's why I ran for Mayor in 2011, and that's why, as Mayor, **giving the same opportunities to the next generation has been my sole focus.**

**I 'm proud of what I accomplished:**
* I balanced a budget of %8.9 billion **8 YEARS in a ROW**
* Cut taxes by **$1,700 PER HOUSEHOLD**
* Saved the taxpayers **$400,000,000.00+** in wasteful spending
* Fought for **transparency and accountability.**

[HELP US IN OUR FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wrmOlQUvKbSMzel3JeF7P0M4aFa86Gpmo2ioBTxjkfto1Yg77Qcvfrw3G3KukNztHrpQHM9EX1yKXYJD-OX67JiPlQcLURCoODaaCbzF77ql39uIfQeYXBoFYI2akPfoi4vPknSE3yi44LsADMHkxuV60-DCe-eis4YmsYKX5b2w-ZTwRgVfOH3laI-K4lfq_XDDoozJE_XWmQp5YTillUO2SapbRkYtPBQYTGsYtpgw1BvNi_dBbpc40PZBxEAT0mPOXOry91Cck10yNmltHtr5Z1suNbrmjaJf3WdVKg6Ay5H78o5pQytAEICNoHOkf_VHR6mJRJLQuGaELJtyo2hE2KIO5Kk5r26Oz3pghh0aqyr9jLxVBV386PzpCigrQgWxX87mnssZaPnG7e4wa4SXMOkYfAtScqADHpOJbRSN8-yFkG6wEbC0evHEyj1q&c=sEIsHWry0RFBsVj3miXr40Xxsnsgix3S1h-qfZUNw-70oRk1bsW67g==&ch=QMVZNmq5f0B90I-6qj6cITg5Ig2Im6ee1u9sxDffLGj9rU2kM1pWEA==) Now, I'm running for Congress **for the same exact reasons.** We must preserve the American Dream that so many feel is out of their reach. As Lincoln said, America is the world's "last best hope." _**and we can 't quit on her, not now, not ever.**_
[HELP US IN OUR FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wrmOlQUvKbSMzel3JeF7P0M4aFa86Gpmo2ioBTxjkfto1Yg77Qcvfrw3G3KukNztHrpQHM9EX1yKXYJD-OX67JiPlQcLURCoODaaCbzF77ql39uIfQeYXBoFYI2akPfoi4vPknSE3yi44LsADMHkxuV60-DCe-eis4YmsYKX5b2w-ZTwRgVfOH3laI-K4lfq_XDDoozJE_XWmQp5YTillUO2SapbRkYtPBQYTGsYtpgw1BvNi_dBbpc40PZBxEAT0mPOXOry91Cck10yNmltHtr5Z1suNbrmjaJf3WdVKg6Ay5H78o5pQytAEICNoHOkf_VHR6mJRJLQuGaELJtyo2hE2KIO5Kk5r26Oz3pghh0aqyr9jLxVBV386PzpCigrQgWxX87mnssZaPnG7e4wa4SXMOkYfAtScqADHpOJbRSN8-yFkG6wEbC0evHEyj1q&c=sEIsHWry0RFBsVj3miXr40Xxsnsgix3S1h-qfZUNw-70oRk1bsW67g==&ch=QMVZNmq5f0B90I-6qj6cITg5Ig2Im6ee1u9sxDffLGj9rU2kM1pWEA==) Victory in JUST 7 DAYS will take everything we have. My opponent is prepared to spend MILLIONS against our campaign, **and we have to start gaining ground against her if we stand any chance of success** \-- that starts by ACHIEVING our fundraising goal that expires in just FOUR DAYS DAYS.

[**Can we count on you to join my fight for the American dream?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wrmOlQUvKbSMzel3JeF7P0M4aFa86Gpmo2ioBTxjkfto1Yg77Qcvfrw3G3KukNztHrpQHM9EX1yKXYJD-OX67JiPlQcLURCoODaaCbzF77ql39uIfQeYXBoFYI2akPfoi4vPknSE3yi44LsADMHkxuV60-DCe-eis4YmsYKX5b2w-ZTwRgVfOH3laI-K4lfq_XDDoozJE_XWmQp5YTillUO2SapbRkYtPBQYTGsYtpgw1BvNi_dBbpc40PZBxEAT0mPOXOry91Cck10yNmltHtr5Z1suNbrmjaJf3WdVKg6Ay5H78o5pQytAEICNoHOkf_VHR6mJRJLQuGaELJtyo2hE2KIO5Kk5r26Oz3pghh0aqyr9jLxVBV386PzpCigrQgWxX87mnssZaPnG7e4wa4SXMOkYfAtScqADHpOJbRSN8-yFkG6wEbC0evHEyj1q&c=sEIsHWry0RFBsVj3miXr40Xxsnsgix3S1h-qfZUNw-70oRk1bsW67g==&ch=QMVZNmq5f0B90I-6qj6cITg5Ig2Im6ee1u9sxDffLGj9rU2kM1pWEA==)

Thanks for all of your help,

Carlos Gimenez

Miami, FL 33174

subject: One week, final deadline
body:
We’re just one week away from Election Day, but today is our final fundraising deadline before the polls close. |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b5aa080911&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| We’re just one week away from Election Day, but today is our final fundraising deadline before the polls close. [Can you help us finish strong](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ee8c147372&e=19cebfe173)?

As we enter the final week, your support is more important than ever. We cannot take anything for granted.

We need to re-elect Governor Phil Scott so he can continue to lead our state through these difficult times, and because he has the vision we need as we rebuild and recover - focusing on growing the economy, making Vermont more affordable and protecting the most vulnerable.

Anything you can [contribute](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5598935a33&e=19cebfe173) makes a huge difference. But most importantly, make sure you get to the polls on or before November 3rd - and remind your friends and family to do the same!

Sincerely,

Jason Maulucci
Campaign Manager
**Phil Scott for Vermont **

---

clean_body: We need every conservative at the polls for President Trump | Friend, There is only one week until election day, and President Trump needs our help! In just one week, everything you value - from our second amendment rights to the future of our brave law enforcement officers - is on the line. The only way to protect your future from the radical Left is to get enough pro-Trump patriots to the polls to secure Florida for the President and his allies. But right now, we don’t have enough resources to defend the sunshine state from the Democrats. When I look at our country, I see two paths we can go on. We can continue to prosper under President Trump for a future of freedom and American excellence -- \-- or we can fall victim to Nancy Pelosi and Ilhan Omar’s socialist agenda and watch our country descend into chaos and depression. Determining which future America chooses is as simple as getting conservatives from their homes to the polls in seven days, and right now, you have a chance to make that happen. Our country’s future depends on you , and we can’t let our fellow conservatives and our President down. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Official Republican Nominee for Congress Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

name: Bill Olson
subject: My race is a tie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

Hi Peter,

I'm about to prove that a Trump conservative can win in Florida- but I need your help to do it!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ
!

I'll cut right to the point- our race is tied. A dead heat.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

A recent local analysis of the race reveals why it's closing:

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Olson said, “This is not personal, but Congressman Soto can be the nicest guy in the world but it doesn’t matter because he doesn’t vote the way I believe people here in Central Florida believe,” Olson said. “He voted with Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, AOC (Ocasio-Cortez), 93% of the time, and I don’t believe that ‘the Squad,’ that the people of Central Florida have that philosophy.”

Soto said his alignment with Pelosi on most House votes reflects his support for an agenda that includes raising wages, expanding access to health care and preserving the environment.

As of Wednesday, Soto had reported about $744,000 in campaign contributions, with about 71% of that coming from political committees. Those contributors include the American Bankers Association, the League of Conservation Voters and Abbott Laboratories.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

This race will revolve around turnout- it's that simple. If we turn out Trump/Olson voters, we will win. If we do not, we will lose.

We have worked hard, and this race is closing fast! People don't want a Pelosi clone who votes with the Squad and is bought off by Swamp lobbyists!

They want a normal guy, a veteran, who has been getting things done for our country for decades!

We have one week. It's all about turnout here. Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

Trump is fighting for Florida, just as I'm fighting for my swing district. Helping me helps him- and we need the help right now!

My district is critical. Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ
today? We need TV ads and GOTV expenditures- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hUfXeISaaF6OuRU&b=j5PzMZfIftxHuk7ePvupBQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

%%First Name%%, imagine waking up the day after the election and learning that Chuck Schumer has taken over the Senate. He will work to EXPAND the Supreme Court and reverse all of our conservative victories. As we celebrate the THIRD Trump-appointed Supreme Court justice, we must double down in our efforts to win this November.

Through my Supreme Court War Room effort, we fought back against the lies and attacks from the mainstream media and radical left against Judge Barrett.

And guess what? **WE WON. Not only did we get Amy confirmed, but polls show that the majority of Americans SUPPORT Justice Barrett.**

Our fight to protect our values is far from over. As we speak, the radical left is already plotting to take over the Senate and EXPAND the Supreme Court.

**It 's the typical liberal playbook: if you can't win fair and square, change the rules to jam through a radical agenda.**

name: YG Nyghtstorm
subject: You’ve never seen a billboard like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by God, Guns & Life PAC
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FkthLWkIfipb8vI4BPdsNvLcclp58xybDvuAgrx0NIFk2NjcblsnnZVypneraXWcqJM1ttOnD12eNYrt7K4Tik3kDkLutf-FjmCgFhj2YfrXuG_51VWq26djTMhI1edMB8GsGph17TJQae42BUrWvZHlNmrEtLZ2FxJMrBqAFUI33l-DaCgWqaRSpcO1cqAyuS7ppicJUu8=&c=oF2uKvE-MC10X-8p_pN9pHe6m1kPTMaV6u-g2ctkZRsGdIcXvwRbkw==&ch=80a1oJoUM0Swql2p6qrF08V7MavatwlchWAmMcsPD7HhFd_gfDdgdQ==) Dear fellow American,
My name is YG Nyghtstorm.
I’m a 6’ 2”, gun-toting, pro-life, Trump-supporting BLACK MAN.
And guess what?
**I’m not staying quiet about the injustices the Democrats have done to black families — how they want to send our babies to broken schools, land them in prisons, and promise them “free” stuff!**
The Democrats have worked to brainwash black communities into thinking they NEED government handouts, when in reality, what we need are strong families.
I’ve teamed up with God, Guns, & Life PAC to spread my message to my black brothers and sisters around the nation. I want them to WAKE UP and see the truth I learned long ago: **__The Democrats don’t care about us.__**
We recently launched two billboards like the one you see above in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. They’re each getting 500 THOUSAND viewers per week -- and they’re turning some heads! I guess the good folks of Milwaukee weren’t expecting a black man like me to belong to the party of __freedom__ and __progress__. HA!
**[My goal is to get these billboards in 10 more states before November, so we can drive millions of black voters to our website where they can learn the truth about liberal policies -- and know that there is a better way. Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to EXPAND this bold and much-needed campaign to capture the black vote for Republicans this fall?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FkthLWkIfipb8vI4BPdsNvLcclp58xybDvuAgrx0NIFk2NjcblsnnZVypneraXWcqJM1ttOnD12eNYrt7K4Tik3kDkLutf-FjmCgFhj2YfrXuG_51VWq26djTMhI1edMB8GsGph17TJQae42BUrWvZHlNmrEtLZ2FxJMrBqAFUI33l-DaCgWqaRSpcO1cqAyuS7ppicJUu8=&c=oF2uKvE-MC10X-8p_pN9pHe6m1kPTMaV6u-g2ctkZRsGdIcXvwRbkw==&ch=80a1oJoUM0Swql2p6qrF08V7MavatwlchWAmMcsPD7HhFd_gfDdgdQ==)** [**Help launch billboards targeting black voters!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FkthLWkIfipb8vI4BPdsNvLcclp58xybDvuAgrx0NIFk2NjcblsnnZVypneraXWcqJM1ttOnD12eNYrt7K4Tik3kDkLutf-FjmCgFhj2YfrXuG_51VWq26djTMhI1edMB8GsGph17TJQae42BUrWvZHlNmrEtLZ2FxJMrBqAFUI33l-DaCgWqaRSpcO1cqAyuS7ppicJUu8=&c=oF2uKvE-MC10X-8p_pN9pHe6m1kPTMaV6u-g2ctkZRsGdIcXvwRbkw==&ch=80a1oJoUM0Swql2p6qrF08V7MavatwlchWAmMcsPD7HhFd_gfDdgdQ==) You see, when we go into black communities, when we explain that the Democrats’ “war on poverty” ultimately removed black dads from families (by removing incentives for marriage), explain to them that Democrats are trying to take away Second Amendment rights from people who look like us, and target the lives of black babies through record abortion rates in our communities — they can’t believe it.
Republicans haven’t focused on the black vote enough, but I’m doing everything I can to change that this year.
_We don’t have much time to spare, and I am not a quiet man, so I’m working with the good folks at God, Guns, & Life PAC to shake things up in a creative way._
But we can’t do it alone!
**Please, PLEASE join me in letting black communities know — the Democrats DON’T care about you. They just care about your vote.**
But conservative, pro-family, pro-life, pro-liberty policies can heal the ills plaguing the black community and our nation. It’s time for black voters to leave the Democratic Party and vote for a brighter future!
**[No one else is doing what we are here at God, Guns,& Life PAC. No one is brave enough to say what we’re saying. But to make sure we reach black communities, I need your gift of $25 or more today to launch more of these “head turning” billboards and make a difference in this year’s elections.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FkthLWkIfipb8vI4BPdsNvLcclp58xybDvuAgrx0NIFk2NjcblsnnZVypneraXWcqJM1ttOnD12eNYrt7K4Tik3kDkLutf-FjmCgFhj2YfrXuG_51VWq26djTMhI1edMB8GsGph17TJQae42BUrWvZHlNmrEtLZ2FxJMrBqAFUI33l-DaCgWqaRSpcO1cqAyuS7ppicJUu8=&c=oF2uKvE-MC10X-8p_pN9pHe6m1kPTMaV6u-g2ctkZRsGdIcXvwRbkw==&ch=80a1oJoUM0Swql2p6qrF08V7MavatwlchWAmMcsPD7HhFd_gfDdgdQ==)**
For freedom,
YG Nyghtstorm National Spokesman God, Guns, Life PAC Paid for by God, Guns & Life PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [www.godgunslife.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FkthLWkIfipb8vI4BPdsNvLcclp58xybDvuAgrx0NIFk2NjcblsnnfYhfUAmnMJu0h6RR_T-83gQFN3eA6KaIBpVjbqYJBU9c3JbIVj3UBbLB9H5by7WVwnT2NbP85xxPY3vXYIvtQ064rjMYZS7EA==&c=oF2uKvE-MC10X-8p_pN9pHe6m1kPTMaV6u-g2ctkZRsGdIcXvwRbkw==&ch=80a1oJoUM0Swql2p6qrF08V7MavatwlchWAmMcsPD7HhFd_gfDdgdQ==) Contributions to the God, Gun & Life PAC are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions.

clean_body: == Dear fellow American, My name is YG Nyghtstorm. I’m a 6’ 2”, gun-toting, pro-life, Trump-supporting BLACK MAN. And guess what? I’m not staying quiet about the injustices the Democrats have done to black families — how they want to send our babies to broken schools, land them in prisons, and promise them “free” stuff! The Democrats have worked to brainwash black communities into thinking they NEED government handouts, when in reality, what we need are strong families. I’ve teamed up with God, Guns, & Life PAC to spread my message to my black brothers and sisters around the nation. I want them to WAKE UP and see the truth I learned long ago: The Democrats don’t care about us. We recently launched two billboards like the one you see above in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. They’re each getting 500 THOUSAND viewers per week -- and they’re turning some heads! I guess the good folks of Milwaukee weren’t expecting a black man like me to belong to the party of freedom and progress. HA! == == You see, when we go into black communities, when we explain that the Democrats’ “war on poverty” ultimately removed black dads from families (by removing incentives for marriage), explain to them that Democrats are trying to take away Second Amendment rights from people who look like us, and target the lives of black babies through record abortion rates in our communities — they can’t believe it. Republicans haven’t focused on the black vote enough, but I’m doing everything I can to change that this year. We don’t have much time to spare, and I am not a quiet man, so I’m working with the good folks at God, Guns, & Life PAC to shake things up in a creative way. But we can’t do it alone! Please, PLEASE join me in letting black communities know — the Democrats DON’T care about you. They just care about your vote. But conservative, pro-family, pro-life, pro-liberty policies can heal the ills plaguing the black community and our nation. It’s time for black voters to leave the Democratic Party and vote for a brighter future! == For freedom, YG Nyghtstorm National Spokesman God, Guns, Life PAC Paid for by God, Guns & Life PAC. name: David Kubal
subject: President Trump needs your prayers
body:
Dear Friend, With only SIX days left until the Presidential Election... ...**we urgently need your help to collect 500,000 prayer notes for our President.** The Left has flat out LIED to the American people about President Trump. That's why I'm asking you to do 2 things for me today.
1. Add your name to this [**_PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP_** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsyuJhhi19IGFYAiB9NdSmin8C6aUD1W3gHmLx5gei2nL5zZAYaGObhmWSUqaWLN5JRjrCO8ktjTYGmJCE6xGotnrFUZFXCEKgafe7Vh0EsqkuTuhmZZsRS6ZVTyn5xf8vlRQzxTX5YUso1qNVhk3GTZ1OeVHoRs5woJTOF0yYCz_T6HPNVkwTGqe7d3126H5VRfUFkz-NS8RqHnNI0bnEmUo5dCUn4CBm&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)right now.
2. Make a special **[tax-deductible gift of $35- or any amount](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6acONiX-3vaU0hz4CJvAOurd7vfc9ITtgPh-cKjBY84g=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)** - to help us deliver more prayer notes to President Trump as he battles the Godless Left.

**[Will you join me in urgent prayer for President Trump at this critical time by adding your name to _this PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP TODAY?_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsyuJhhi19IGFYAiB9NdSmin8C6aUD1W3gHmLx5gei2nL5zZAYaGObhmWSUqaWLN5JRjrCO8ktjTYGmJCE6xGotnrFUZFXCEKgafe7Vh0EsqkuTuhmZZsRS6ZVTyn5xf8vlRQzxTX5YUso1qNVhk3GTZ1OeVHoRs5woJTOF0yYCz_T6HPNVkwTGqe7d3126H5VRfUFkz-NS8SmJ2Jm1yquknEfNNa-tLHQ&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)**
Let me step back and introduce myself--I'm David Kubal and I'm blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA).
Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. Specifically, we desire to reach Christians nationwide with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer. That's exactly why I've written directly to you today. **[And it's also the reason I've included this link to the special personal _PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP._](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsyuJhhi19IGFYAiB9NdSmin8C6aUD1W3gHmLx5gei2nL5zZAYaGObhmWSUqaWLN5JRjrCO8ktjTYGmJCE6xGotnrFUZFXCEKgafe7Vh0EsqkuTuhmZZsRS6ZVTyn5xf8vlRQzxTX5YUso1qNVhk3GTZ1OeVHoRs5woJTOF0yYCz_T6HPNVkwTGqe7d3126H5VRfUFkz-NS8SmJ2Jm1yquknEfNNa-tLHQ&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)** To date, IFA has delivered more than 100,000 prayers to President Trump. We're getting ready to deliver another round of personal prayers to the President and I want to make sure yours is included.

**With only 6 days until the election, President Trump needs to know that Americans are fervently praying for him as he endures baseless attacks and accusations from the left.**

You see, I know for a fact that President Trump and Vice President Pence cherish notes of prayer just like the one you can sign today. President Trump recently shared publicly: **_" WE USE THEM EVERY DAY."_**
Vice President Pence has added, **_" WE READ THESE EVERY DAY AND THEY'RE WONDERFUL!"_** If you've already signed this petition, I encourage you to share it with your friends, family and coworkers -- anyone who believes in the power of prayer and supporting President Trump... Because we must collect 500,000 additional prayer pledge signatures in the next few weeks. **[That's why I'm asking you to make a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to help us gather 500,000 more prayers for our brave President.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6acONiX-3vaU0hz4CJvAOurd7vfc9ITtgPh-cKjBY84g=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)**

_Why is this so important?_

On a daily basis President Trump endures relentless personal and spiritual attacks from the Godless Left. We've seen these attacks appear in many different ways...

Attacks from the rising tide of witchcraft in our nation with self-proclaimed witches openly casting their spells to bind and destroy our President. Attacks from the "fake news" media spinning biased stories against our President, his family, and his team of advisors. And attacks from liberal politicians who want to see our President thrown out of office. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6NTWENsoMxLfPCIAxBTSG3bD6utt1rGonFdZ5kM-BVU8=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==) Here's our President Trump, worn after a long hard day of enduring attacks from his enemies all the while fighting for our country
Today I need your help as a prayer leader in your community to combat these attacks on our President by blanketing the White House with around the clock prayer protection. So please, **[join my prayer team](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsyuJhhi19IGFYAiB9NdSmin8C6aUD1W3gHmLx5gei2nL5zZAYaGObhmWSUqaWLN5JRjrCO8ktjTYGmJCE6xGotnrFUZFXCEKgafe7Vh0EsqkuTuhmZZsRS6ZVTyn5xf8vlRQzxTX5YUso1qNVhk3GTZ1OeVHoRs5woJTOF0yYCz_T6HPNVkwTGqe7d3126H5VRfUFkz-NS8SmJ2Jm1yquknEfNNa-tLHQ&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==) **for President Trump and uplift him with a personal note to remind him he's not fighting alone.

[**Once you 've signed your name as a prayer warrior for the President, will you take the next step and add a $35 donation to your name so we can deliver 500,000 prayer notes directly to the President?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6NTWENsoMxLfPCIAxBTSG3bD6utt1rGonFdZ5kM-BVU8=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)

As you know, it only took 19 minutes from the moment President Trump put his hand on the Bible, took the oath of office, and became our 45th President before The Washington Post ran the headline:

**" The campaign to impeach President Trump has begun."**
And while President Trump was completely acquitted from the impeachment attack of the radical Left earlier this year - the war for the heart and soul of our country is __far__ from over.

We must also remember that God's word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. As Believers, we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to:
* Keep President Trump, and those who serve him, safe from the enemy's snares and free from the assumer's traps (Psalm 141: 9-10).
* Ensure President Trump would show no fear toward the evil that assails him (Isaiah 8:12), but rather overcome it with a zeal and passion for His laws which bring life and liberty to all (Proverbs 10:29-32).
* Sustain President Trump so that he will continue to love His Word and seek His wisdom diligently (Proverbs 8:17), remaining open and teachable to Godly counsel and heaven's wisdom (Proverbs 1:7).
* Grant President Trump increased grace and blessing as he heeds His voice and obeys His Word (Proverbs 21:1).
* Allow President Trump to rule in the midst of his enemies, not backing down or wavering due to threats or intimidation (Psalm 110:1-2, Ephesians 6:13).

Friend, I'm counting on you to step up, take action, and join your brothers and sisters in Christ together as we lift up President Trump in prayer to our Lord and Savior --- and let him know we are doing it.

As I mentioned earlier, IFA has already delivered more than 100,000 prayers to President Trump --- thanks to spirit-led prayer warriors just like you.

But as the President's enemies ramp up their attacks --- we must also ramp up our efforts to fight back in the most powerful way possible--- with prayer.
So that's why, between now and the election, our goal is to collect and deliver more than 500,000 personal _**PRAYER NOTES FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP**_ to the White House. I've got to be honest with you though...it costs a lot of money to deliver 500,000 PRAYER NOTES to the White House. **[After signing your prayer note, I ask that you make a special, tax-deductible donation of $35 to deliver more prayers to President Trump.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6NTWENsoMxLfPCIAxBTSG3bD6utt1rGonFdZ5kM-BVU8=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)** Please know that you're helping build a community of faithful Americans praying for President Trump during this relentlessly trying time. Together we'll help President Trump make America great again by getting millions of Americans praying again.
Thank you for being a prayer warrior I can rely on. [**SEND YOUR NOTE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsyuJhhi19IGFYAiB9NdSmin8C6aUD1W3gHmLx5gei2nL5zZAYaGObhmWSUqaWLN5JRjrCO8ktjTYGmJCE6xGotnrFUZFXCEKgafe7Vh0EsqkuTuhmZZsRS6ZVTyn5xf8vlRQzxTX5YUso1qNVhk3GTZ1OeVHoRs5woJTOF0yYCz_T6HPNVkwTGqe7d3126H5VRfUFkz-NS8SmJ2Jm1yquknEfNNa-tLHQ&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)
_**God Bless,**_
David Kubal, President & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA)
P.S. President Trump needs our prayer protection now more than ever. [**Please join my prayer team for President Trump by signing your personal PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP right away.** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsyuJhhi19IGFYAiB9NdSmin8C6aUD1W3gHmLx5gei2nL5zZAYaGObhmWSUqaWLN5JRjrCO8ktjTYGmJCE6xGotnrFUZFXCEKgafe7Vh0EsqkuTuhmZZsRS6ZVTyn5xf8vlRQzxTX5YUso1qNVhk3GTZ1OeVHoRs5woJTOF0yYCz_T6HPNVkwTGqe7d3126H5VRfUFkz-NS8SmJ2Jm1yquknEfNNa-tLHQ&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)

**[If you're able, I hope you'll also make a special tax-deductible gift of any amount to help us deliver even more prayer notes to our President.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6acONiX-3vaU0hz4CJvAOurd7vfc9ITtgPh-cKjBY84g=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)** P.P.S. Progressives continue their attempt to destroy President Trump at any cost, blaming him for things that are out of his control. We cannot become discouraged, our God is a God of justice, and we must pray that justice will be restored in his perfect timing. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSsdbMOC6JdekdF80v_ePGA3lYoT7CnkzO3twnmzYwSZotLk-M2E7Cu8JWN9UHnkuTwDtZE-icSTvVjC9I52TN4TviGLPtgxzurt7wBrndHI0bN-RBUMQCnhV222LLWY08budJiys8VLOkllcZhj8Ovlno-8IOZh5o6NTWENsoMxLfPCIAxBTSG3bD6utt1rGonFdZ5kM-BVU8=&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==) Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting. | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSs8XqXuViOuAYX1DIMudaQhLYT11rgby4HGXU24ul9zxplrltxsi0po_dPRlgf5gCKax8OYG6VXfCe_OYPyy2dzOJE6ObWkL4I&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==) | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSs7azPEQQl8bb1_d5VTJkh2Idomx2KY-zp2fNQrGoda9G7il7-EQgTlLEM6v1tA-Clexu-W62-dqNhPfZOBXBO_DPyfw8rJBvJ&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==) | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l0Pfc_IcEvDDLFMA6IsX1tPgKBU0fxQexCYUut_jWAhKQZIpDv-Iz39498OPIjSszHAkN_ULVT0zZqASkPIFHNcTbpgMq_o4NgCRW3NPCPilBC0_2GjUeN-Z3vjWHBbk_VMP36kTf0aBEC0FuDKWMYoY5iKv1u8P9CTNIRwlU--ErWOXx7AfctnAGJ_L1UYD&c=7AcW25YjCNHmEzJr1gVi7Zifh0h3Un4dxOkC975MMowA_fejACv8Mg==&ch=bKaf3eSxZ7-eNh45vjSEJPGBvNIRZyI1jVDIb3n6YJ2PLQOogxhgZg==)

clean_body: Dear Friend, With only SIX days left until the Presidential Election... ...we urgently need your help to collect 500,000 prayer notes for our President. The Left has flat out LIED to the American people about President Trump. That's why I'm asking you to do 2 things for me today. 1. Add your name to this now. 2. Make a special == - to help us deliver more prayer notes to President Trump as he battles the Godless Left. == Let me step back and introduce myself--I'm David Kubal and I'm blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA). Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. Specifically, we desire to reach Christians nationwide with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer. That's exactly why I've written directly to you today. == To date, IFA has delivered more than 100,000 prayers to President Trump. We're getting ready to deliver another round of personal prayers to the President and I want to make sure yours is included. With only 6 days until the election, President Trump needs to know that Americans are fervently praying for him as he endures baseless attacks and accusations from the left. You see, I know for a fact that President Trump and Vice President Pence cherish notes of prayer just like the one you can sign today. President Trump recently shared publicly: " WE USE THEM EVERY DAY." Vice President Pence has added, " WE READ THESE EVERY DAY AND THEY'RE WONDERFUL!" If you've already signed this petition, I encourage you to share it with your friends, family and coworkers -- anyone who believes in the power of prayer and supporting President Trump... Because we must collect 500,000 additional prayer pledge signatures in the next few weeks. == Why is this so important? On a daily basis President Trump endures relentless personal and spiritual attacks from the Godless Left. We've seen these attacks appear in many different ways... Attacks from the rising tide of witchcraft in our nation with self-proclaimed witches openly casting their spells to bind and destroy our President. Attacks from the "fake news" media spinning biased stories against our President, his family, and his team of advisors. And attacks from liberal politicians who want to see our President thrown out of office. == Here's our President Trump, worn after a long hard day of enduring attacks from his enemies all the while fighting for our country Today I need your help as a prayer leader in your community to combat these attacks on our President by blanketing the White House with around the clock prayer protection. So please, == for President Trump and uplift him with a personal note to remind him he's not fighting alone. == As you know, it only took 19 minutes from the moment President Trump put his hand on the Bible, took the oath of office, and became our 45th President before The Washington Post ran the headline: " The campaign to impeach President Trump has begun." And while President Trump was completely acquitted from the impeachment attack of the radical Left earlier this year - the war for the heart and soul of our country is far from over. We must also remember that God's word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. As Believers, we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to: Keep President Trump, and those who serve him, safe from the enemy's snares and free from the assumer's traps (Psalm 141: 9-10). Ensure President Trump would show no fear toward the evil that assails him (Isaiah 8:12), but rather overcome it with a zeal and passion for His laws which bring life and liberty to all (Proverbs 10:29-32). Sustain President Trump so that he will continue to love His Word and seek His wisdom diligently (Proverbs 8:17), remaining open and teachable to Godly counsel and heaven's wisdom (Proverbs 1:7). Grant President Trump increased grace and blessing as he heeds His voice and obeys His Word (Proverbs 21:1). Allow President Trump to rule in the midst of his enemies, not backing down or wavering due to threats or intimidation (Psalm 110:1-2, Ephesians 6:13). Friend, I'm counting on you to step up, take action, and join your brothers and sisters in Christ together as we lift up President Trump in prayer to our Lord and Savior --- and let him know we are doing it. As I mentioned earlier, IFA has already delivered more than 100,000 prayers to President Trump --- thanks to spirit-led prayer warriors just like you. But as the President's enemies ramp up their attacks --- we must also ramp up our efforts to fight back in the most powerful way possible--- with prayer. So that's why, between now and the election, our goal is to collect and deliver more than 500,000 personal PRAYER NOTES FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP to the White House. I've got to be honest with you though...it costs a lot of money to deliver 500,000 PRAYER NOTES to the White House. == Please know that you're helping build a community of faithful Americans praying for President Trump during this relentlessly trying time. Together we'll help President Trump make America great again by getting millions of Americans praying again. Thank you for being a prayer warrior I can rely on. == God Bless, David Kubal, President & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA) P.S. President Trump needs our prayer protection now more than ever. == == P.P.S. Progressives continue their attempt to destroy President Trump at any cost, blaming him for things that are out of his control. We cannot become discouraged, our God is a God of justice, and we must pray that justice will be restored in his perfect timing. == Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting. | | == | == | == ---|---|--- (C) 2020 Intercessors for America | ==** P.O. subject: Join Our Team Hunt Final Countdown Phone Bank!

body:
Friend,

We are in the final countdown to Election Day. Only 4 more days of early
voting remain and Election Day is just 8 days away!

As 7th District residents head to the polls, we need your help to ensure we
get as many Team Hunt supporters to the polls as possible. Help us accomplish
this mission by joining our Team Hunt Final Countdown Phone Bank!

By joining our phone bank you can help Team Hunt reach as many voters as
possible in the 7th District. The opportunity to bring new leadership to the
7th District is closer than ever before and residents throughout our community
can help by casting their votes today. Help us reach as many voters in the
district as possible and ensure no voter gets left behind!

To participate, email us at info@wesleyfortexas.com or call us
at 713-244-6369.

We look forward to connecting with you soon!

Thank you,
Team Hunt

endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Without Any Fear or Favor’: Amy Coney Barrett Vows to Uphold Constitution at Supreme Court Swearing-in Ceremony
body:
Amy Coney Barrett vowed to remain independent of external political pressures and policy preferences as she spoke about preserving the Constitution | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=46a7facc7f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Without Any Fear or Favor’: Amy Coney Barrett Vows to Uphold Constitution at Supreme Court Swearing-in Ceremony**

“Amy Coney Barrett vowed to remain independent of external political pressures and her own policy preferences as she spoke about preserving the Constitution during a ceremonial Supreme Court swearing-in event,” Jerry Dunleavy reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“I love the Constitution and the democratic republic that it establishes—and I will devote myself to preserving it,” Justice Barrett said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=684061bbce&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:**[**Barrett’s confirmation is a triumph for conservative women**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8629c3d95&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Much like President Ronald Reagan, Trump rebuilt the military (which the Obama-Biden administration depleted), and then used this potential firepower and his outsized personality to forge peace through strength.” Following a series of peace deals across the Middle East, “in foreign affairs, America is better off now than it was four years ago,” Deroy Murdock writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f4dd8e72d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Last week, some fantastic news from the science world should’ve given full-time-schooling advocates real hope. Instead, officials are signaling that we may never return to full in-person learning . . . The rest of the world has prioritized children and education and opened schools full-time. It’s an embarrassment that America’s major cities have no plan to do the same,” Karol Markowicz writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a9d389d28&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Democrats and Republicans alike can agree on one thing: prescription drug prices are unacceptably high. Predictably, however, we cannot seem to agree on a proper solution to this urgent issue. The Trump administration has, thankfully, kickstarted efforts and approved record numbers of generic drugs while simultaneously lowering overall prescription drug prices by 13 percent,” Rep. Greg Steube (R-FL) writes for [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d999108a1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f82112bcc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3572fd7d57&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=915657f9ef)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Summer Shedd
subject: Tom O'Halleran’s LIE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, _Tom O’Halleran will say**ANYTHING** to get elected._ Over the weekend, O’Halleran sent a mailer out with a bold face lie -- that my mom, Tiffany Shedd, does not support protecting pre-existing conditions and that she would prevent diabetics like me from getting the healthcare they need.
As a type-1 diabetic, I know these statements are **COMPLETELY FALSE**. I went to Phoenix Children’s Hospital, where I almost died before being diagnosed as a diabetic, to ask Tom O’Halleran a question -- _have you no shame?_ **Watch my video to Tom.** [ ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0521d520f94d414c84a0e4e47ab6fc81&_e=3gja2VqWZriwHDvqMQRnrUeVk4cTFGGZ3HKU8pf3brqvMOK6o3i2OsbYP44wWGJz7sqUnk1VThNhShPXNVj817c-NGZzVT523eyymudk46p7jPfYW1bqS-jSfI3CcRYxOM-xZiGLV4RAPNaZ57j0lmfRRZsfhC-r4lDuWNt49-Ixw_MRlmAO4-8zn2-fADfuVpYlwebIsVq353laOxaFUTr34O4jjFJXk-dHjG_UouzmwWZ7HkOuRtzSJBEmjjozXjVTmo7eoeKfz1o6GbgixpiIVbdahQJwk9QyVy25DT-CPjYysWVIPW_gAZqHxj4PpUGy0iNlZmXgRehWYwYYIk0lJCshhgwellC00OPMo7Bsz-4EEgu3LyumxmF_aILU2ao09ECJ-LQRyelR4Moq1ScHjnysSVYWP-l5klobFyGG8V5eRRCtAMnA6kQiTL-G) If O’Halleran is willing to lie about our family like this, what else is he willing to lie about? The worst part is, he’s funding his campaign with money from big pharmaceutical companies including the one who raised insulin prices by **almost 700%.**
My mom understands pre-existing health conditions better than anyone else . . . and Tom O’Halleran knows that. This is shameful and wrong!
We only have **1 WEEK left until Election Day** \-- we can’t let someone who stoops so low to continue to represent us in Washington. Chip in anything you can right now to help elect a real leader who will work for Arizona -- my mom, Tiffany Shedd. We only have 1 WEEK left until Election Day \-- we can’t let someone who stoops so low to continue to represent us in Washington. Chip in anything you can right now to help elect a real leader who will work for Arizona -- my mom, Tiffany Shedd. The voters need to know who the real Tom O’Halleran is. Thank you, Summer Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

| | | **I just wanted to make sure you saw this email from the other day!**

| You are invited to join me for a watch party of the classic Halloween movie “Hocus Pocus” this Thursday, **October 29th at 6pm CST**!

The movie will be viewed virtually via Amazon Watch Party (_you must have an Amazon Prime account to view_) and the link to the watch party will be sent earlier in the day on Thursday.

All the proceeds from this event will go directly towards campaign GOTV efforts so that we can get our message out and expand the Democratic House majority!

Tickets start at $20. [Click here to reserve your ticket](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a8efa0ad0e&e=140a9b81e7)!

clean_body: You are invited to join me for a watch party of the classic Halloween movie “Hocus Pocus” this Thursday, October 29th at 6pm CST! | | | | | | | | I just wanted to make sure you saw this email from the other day! | You are invited to join me for a watch party of the classic Halloween movie “Hocus Pocus” this Thursday, October 29th at 6pm CST! The movie will be viewed virtually via Amazon Watch Party (you must have an Amazon Prime account to view) and the link to the watch party will be sent earlier in the day on Thursday. All the proceeds from this event will go directly towards campaign GOTV efforts so that we can get our message out and expand the Democratic House majority! Tickets start at $20. ! Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Get your ticket today" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

_Early voting is underway!_

If you want to vote before Election Day, now’s the time. [_Find your polling place and make a plan to vote_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c91e36afd7&e=1acd9bb3d6).

We’re working hard to win over every voter we can – safely knocking on doors, delivering candidate literature, making phone calls, and reaching out to folks online.

**We’re already seeing incredible turnout statewide – Hoosiers are keyed into this election. And it’s absolutely vital that we get __every__ Republican to the polls!**

So please, make your plan to vote early... and bring a family member or friend along with you! And if you can't vote early, find your polling place and make a plan to vote on Election Day.
_**[>> If you’re not sure where to vote, you can find your polling location here <<](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=761e346452&e=1acd9bb3d6)**_
Make sure to make YOUR voice heard. Pick a time, mark your calendar, and make a difference!

\- Team Indiana GOP

There are only 7 days left, and the next couple of days are the most important part of our campaign. We need your help to finish strong and put the Lowcountry First on November 3rd.
Can Nancy count on you to match our average email donation of **[$34.08](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7444203707e344dbb6d7a22d9169f58c&_e=X7XyXUHFCQRPOMOBl4WmwffqDV4CTC-KrDSuZOzka61Zs8a179dF6dtb2Q-eFfGc_tkSb3fWTC2DiECfpRPSWvMV9bvv2mxlyCG1GhjYfpv6G3o8P08Z7rRDyQF01KlyzEkmZTY7Jwudcr3sxOXzDG7_DiNlexjCONiaeQW7_t9U34O8MCb0HiX5wqOhstEgBGvEVYy_c5kdlqCFO2hCP2f0DbCCtVEjkmqWxyzVeg-qNJHRM_DPYfROTb28Cwr4l0dnf0yr_ykHlxdrzIopLKUhq7rFizNzzjTpWOxObwSyb8di4sEaw3uhG_bq4D6YxsJyEy-sZGmiWLtg6RloNsBmEFjNqr0gNRmHbCpriNlL0JX1zEVMfWnmTP1n02eVU9PrNAXodbGrBLxzvA0uUpb7dtnjNY2stGRKTOzE06dvGE8dC9-KQPaEA4tby6mv5i_MQusn6pYTWDRT-5Q9uNwWBBsH0zCLkt9Wrazz7QiLs74LiEwAlBU9cYBPuNkx)** and help us reach our end of month goal?
