To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7444203707e344dbb6d7a22d9169f58c&_e=X7XyXUHFCQRPOMOBl4WmwffqDV4CTC-KrDSuZOzka61Zs8a179dF6dtb2Q-eFfGcHPme30eWX_BJd6Qrb3EKl_uAmKrrV6ukC0jP01XgrO9ts881v7rqfsGE4U8K9RWujgb5ygs_zflftrk9VEv7zkpdyNIsKnLuCyBajFngotySiAPMOTSpFxoDVvkSdg2opTPFOIbzq-1eH6Q5HOSx82dHd4Ms9jHHzyxNBEQIJihGwyuwiSJ-T4VkvheQONvFkxoAjhcsqt0r6ouHPfqj4Wtlm2Fx8pi7A8Nzn0VGzGxWOPenrf3K4PEOpz-Ult_KHba8ENoCy9Tq0re6Bi53pWMkLp-Wa17aojv14moVVFkgwJyykBKfeaCEpVS30-Ae56HSjHKmyq7GCOtRokTIAEyYsQkSfpotQe2Puu6PbCD3MNnEIjZ1_5ZL0GL80JxAhFbXOEFuaoJp8jy5gTbyE_JYou4TT-TcFtHW0Mzzn40%3D)** [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7444203707e344dbb6d7a22d9169f58c&_e=X7XyXUHFCQRPOMOBl4WmwffqDV4CTC-KrDSuZOzka61Zs8a179dF6dtb2Q-eFfGc_tkSb3fWTC2DiECfpRPSWvMV9bvv2mxlyCG1GhjYfpv6G3o8P08Z7rRDyQF01KlyzEkmZTY7Jwudcr3sxOXzDG7_DiNlexjCONiaeQW7_t9U34O8MCb0HiX5wqOhstEgBGvEVYy_c5kdlqCFO2hCP2f0DbCCtVEjkmqWxyzVeg-qNJHRM_DPYfROTb28Cwr4l0dnf0yr_ykHlxdrzIopLKUhq7rFizNzzjTpWOxObwS5gJZ297QzxtTdXlrMXvoeCFm1FT10v2Yq4oPan4pqgv4q7dJ8yAIuPt-J_JhIu88YinbLQVPf5KgSbIuJMgyi5jZXmDJjuGCHqr65jajV-5ipkdYEKHO0CIIzsQoCLPAvjW3OY14tacZ4Ef2FgJs2V1EPWZ4HFaAxpQrrHTcSz8wysZ994b5v7XgNRk8jOQRBVRzQUHlGW20Fo3NJenm4) Well friend, this is it.
**The final push. **
We’re coming up on Election Day, and this week marks our last End of Month fundraising deadline before November 3rd.
We’ve come so far since I launched my campaign, and it’s all thanks to the hard work of small-dollar grassroots donors like you, friend.
Your passion and enthusiasm for restoring leadership that puts the Lowcountry First are unmatched. We’re knocking on the door of Congress because of you, and I couldn’t be more excited to represent you in Washington after we win on Election Day.
**But we can’t give a single inch over the next couple of days — it’s the most important week of my campaign and I need your more support now more than ever. **
Since August, our average email donation is just **[$34.08](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7444203707e344dbb6d7a22d9169f58c&_e=X7XyXUHFCQRPOMOBl4WmwffqDV4CTC-KrDSuZOzka61Zs8a179dF6dtb2Q-eFfGc_tkSb3fWTC2DiECfpRPSWvMV9bvv2mxlyCG1GhjYfpv6G3o8P08Z7rRDyQF01KlyzEkmZTY7Jwudcr3sxOXzDG7_DiNlexjCONiaeQW7_t9U34O8MCb0HiX5wqOhstEgBGvEVYy_c5kdlqCFO2hCP2f0DbCCtVEjkmqWxyzVeg-qNJHRM_DPYfROTb28Cwr4l0dnf0yr_ykHlxdrzIopLKUhq7rFizNzzjTpWOxObwTAGLNUkWdC3p3e_hVY9aIuYBl-N1cF3qskb1fhDRtR_d45Z0UF6rYozgHcc5PK4Xxq65dq4OLwI_NzsNGSRA0viDXEik_-kLzOeNi6a-HoCnv7KODvbXGZSqPiPG_euQgyYi1TfnPdmLivJuZycd7Xpz-vcG2Q87ruOI-TA8_Da1UHlMVCgSYGlCKdgzGzl9v0fJk65y4CKhsePGGKE2HD)**. Getting 100 people to match this average would help us compete on the airwaves and spread our message all across the Lowcountry.
_This would be a huge boost for us, and our race is going to come down to the wire. Crushing our End of Month deadline would help us keep our momentum going and turn out voters on Election Day. _
Can I count on you to chip in our average donation and help us reach our End of Month goal?
**Donate here:** **[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1653891/avg-amount/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7444203707e344dbb6d7a22d9169f58c&_e=X7XyXUHFCQRPOMOBl4WmwffqDV4CTC-KrDSuZOzka61Zs8a179dF6dtb2Q-eFfGc_tkSb3fWTC2DiECfpRPSWvMV9bvv2mxlyCG1GhjYfpv6G3o8P08Z7rRDyQF01KlyzEkmZTY7Jwudcr3sxOXzDG7_DiNlexjCONiaeQW7_t9U34O8MCb0HiX5wqOhstEgBGvEVYy_c5kdlqCFO2hCP2f0DbCCtVEjkmqWxyzVeg-qNJHRM_DPYfROTb28Cwr4l0dnf0yr_ykHlxdrzIopLKUhq7rFizNzzjTpWOxObwRFNKKn3mD-uMm3qNLBKhj5F1FxzN2ROpr0onqsDGa8vNi55qTeB5EXW6_mA_ILYpBjoknBoOb4klKBgY4YptoJddQbFfJuksMdtSmUhkQRhl8jBxV6YT93RxdJxIxsf0ZgHjtZJI2lQJy3dUqji9WRZb8Ann-ezkUrkFwBwi97GPLgI8XmoMqIkR1xiMgwYfoiUZigBknismk9W6fRJwMI)**
Thank you for your support,
Nancy Mace |

clean_body: Maxine Waters has "represented" Los Angeles for 44 years, but things are so bad here that even she refuses to live in our district. | Fellow patriot, I'm Joe Collins, the Republican and Navy veteran running for Congress against Maxine Waters. You've probably seen my new ad "Mansion Maxine" on social media: Maxine Waters has "represented" Los Angeles for 44 years, but things are so bad here that even she refuses to live in our district. While Maxine sits in her out-of-district mansion, the rest of us have to live with the crime, violence, drugs, poverty and homelessness that her decades of failed radical policies have created. I'm running for Congress to undo the mess that Maxine Waters has created, When I turned 18, I joined the U.S. Navy. During my service, I was deployed to a combat zone during Operation Iraqi Freedom. But while I was away serving my country and fighting in a war, Maxine Waters couldn't even be bothered to fight for our own community. So when I returned home from war, it was our district that looked like a war zone. Los Angeles deserves better! America deserves better! I need your help to hold Maxine Waters accountable for her failed soclialist policies, fix the mess she's created in our community, and ensure what has happened in Los Angeles doesn't happen to the rest of our country. Thank you! Joe Collins U.S. Navy Veteran Republican for Congress | | Joe Collins is a black conservative, Navy veteran, and Republican from South Central Los Angeles, and he is running to to defeat radical leftist Maxine Waters. ---|--- Joe Collins For Congress 5777 W. Hope all is well
|

| | Peter, I'm terrified. Trump himself is flying into Nebraska to destroy my chances TODAY.

I know you haven't donated to my campaign yet so I wanted to take this opportunity to reach out personally:

**[If I fail to close my $9,398 budget gap in the next 7 hours, Trump's massive rally will wipe out my two-point lead and I will lose this race.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b406/109928324/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201026_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** So I'm asking: Can I count on you to chip in immediately?
**_[https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b406/109928324/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201026_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Trump is swooping in with 7 days to go because he knows NE-02's electoral college vote could DECIDE the presidential election.

And Trump knows that in a race this close, his visit could be the fatal blow to my campaign.

**[But I refuse to throw in the towel and surrender to Trump in these final days. If I can raise $9,398 in the next 7 hours I will have the resources I need to fight to the bitter end.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b406/109928324/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201026_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

**[Peter, I need you to step up and make your first donation to my campaign today. It is now or never.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b406/109928324/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201026_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Will you rush a donation before all hope is lost in 7 hours?

**_[https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b406/109928324/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201026_em_fr_b2_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Thanks for your support,

Kara

[](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b401/109928324/VEsA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://www.facebook.com/eastmanforcongress") [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b400/109928324/VEsB/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://twitter.com/karaforcongress") [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b403/109928324/VEsO/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://www.instagram.com/karaforcongress/")
Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b402/109928324/VEsP/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b40d/109928324/VEsHBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b4/77d4c309/221238be/2635b40c/109928324/VEsHBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAy9h_rEOoF2jn2EtNx8xDnafD0x8rsDc_-4Q7MaPFE=/qgc22kud5ZGOvniqOfIcgOdpwdC-yickM8HXG0PG4fc=)
**Never forget** that Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, who blocked President Obama's SCOTUS nominee because it was _" an election year,"_ confirmed Justice Amy Coney Barrett _8 days before Election Day._
**Never forget** that when _ 60 million_ Americans had already cast their votes, a Republican-controlled Senate **defied the will of the American people** to appoint an extreme, right-wing conservative judge who will likely remain on the Court for the rest of her life.
**Never forget** that every Senator that voted _yes_ on Judge Barrett's nomination, was willing to put our health care, Dreamers, women's reproductive freedom, and LGBTQ+ rights in jeopardy.
We don't know about you, but we're seeing **red. **However, we're not going to sit here and wallow -- we're going to **stand up** and **fight back. **
We're going to organize and vote to take back the White House _and_ the Senate.
We're going to elect leaders like Linda Sanchez, who puts the needs of working people **first. **
And we're going to do it with YOUR help!
[**If your ready to send a message to the Trump Administration and the GOP, please chip in anything you can today >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAy9h_rEOoF2jn2EtNx8xDnafD0x8rsDc_-4Q7MaPFE=/wZhhcO4-VkfCqeL925KfeoBfIu4fPONbefsgzH7Z7zQ=?refcode=X_102720_SupremeCourt)

Thank you,
_\-- Team S anchez_

Never forget that when 60 million Americans had already cast their votes, a Republican-controlled Senate defied the will of the American people to appoint an extreme, right-wing conservative judge who will likely remain on the Court for the rest of her life. Never forget that every Senator that voted yes on Judge Barrett's nomination, was willing to put our health care, Dreamers, women's reproductive freedom, and LGBTQ+ rights in jeopardy. We don't know about you, but we're seeing red. However, we're not going to sit here and wallow -- we're going to stand up and fight back. We're going to organize and vote to take back the White House and the Senate. We're going to elect leaders like Linda Sanchez, who puts the needs of working people first. And we're going to do it with YOUR help! Thank you, \-- Team S anchez = * Paid for by Stand with Sánchez Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Freitas
subject: NEW: Spanberger's Iran Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, Last week Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger revealed for the first time exactly what she did during her time in the CIA. **During a closed-door forum, Spanberger bragged about gathering the intel that informed the Obama Administration before they signed the infamous Iran Deal that sent pallets of cash to the terrorist-supporting regime in Iran that was funding and arming terrorist groups going after American soldiers.** Not only this, but she bragged about how her intelligence made the American people "safer." **[This morning, Nick exposed this story because he knows firsthand who this Iran deal didn't make safer.](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=1dcf2e22a3d247e98ba11e9ba93d6a4b&_e=eD3kJTpjo_gYcxv72dHPATStF7b70TNdclZCy-nd2w35aS_fxdOIw_mHmLL18p--Do1A00QloLTdRe5ELq2yeeE9af74inG64nYFqy6XAMWH5yV6_wZ-nPlXiwzMajeMBaSq1DW2z5jREaB1Ng0YXi7iEpFWWVy0p6aAnSTX7c-1O26SnSxUKqy58rbfrFJX2U2zfk64wXf2ozWArgwYkO6x1RtnkZuo8YbST8q0_4x-ZnuEyNyy5wSLSAXJbEfbrAwhjFmAYg5Upkd_Ptz-Vg%3D%3D)** The Obama Administration under the Iran Nuclear deal gave over $1 billion in US tax dollars to a terrorist-supporting regime in Iran that was actively working to kill American servicemen and women.
The fact that Abigail Spanberger would brag about this in front of a combat veteran who lost friends by munitions sent into Iraq from Iran is despicable. 7th District voters deserve to know the truth about Spanberger's record in the CIA. Her support for the Iran Deal, coupled with her condemnation of President Trump's efforts to undo this agreement, speaks volumes about her lack of judgment and ability to properly represent this district and its thousands of veterans in Congress. If Abigail Spanberger thinks dropping off pallets of cash funded by US taxpayers to a terrorist-supporting regime that is actively targeting our service members is a good idea, then she lacks the judgment needed to serve in Congress, especially on the Foreign Affairs Committee like she is currently. **[Watch Nick's video statement on this story here.](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=1dcf2e22a3d247e98ba11e9ba93d6a4b&_e=eD3kJTpjo_gYcxv72dHPAbGSASl66HonxOtxTcvuWtKaMa1ldQ0s_p5jYPpn-JOjesRuoXb3dyWkFm-O6I7brd1vmrf-A20XRlKn6Q2YTeiNP7zWELLWx0j1D7S9cENuVYv5a3uV2r0ZOODBdCKGv5oWLJi7xalpMVQNv21P9B2tRUSYOPuIYfmwr-E-4PK-QAZIux_qR5itsm6m3EVJ1U7TVE68ULFZbsp0_6jLVNFnuLhFVnjOZNmf2vHPCBrr4aJbAO4B7JadYhQtUz66Kw%3D%3D)** Join us tonight at 8 PM as Nick discusses this newly-revealed story during his final Tuesday Night Town Hall. -Team Freitas _P.S. - Congresswoman Spanberger has gone on record admitting she supplied intelligence that led to the Iran Nuclear Deal, a deal which saw American tax dollars sent to Iran despite Iran's continued funding of terrorists and militias targeting American soldiers. She no longer deserves to be in a position of public trust._
[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=1dcf2e22a3d247e98ba11e9ba93d6a4b&_e=eD3kJTpjo_gYcxv72dHPAeWVjTrrkLUIfLqxr5ThBtsFlPPCd3JQDS-RgSEDQ6oylqS-zrPcC_RnznNzfT63ZcRi1ESS7sC59gNJUWfpSUav48Rf_Jfd5qOMNJiTQ_HrGUFsJX6EW4Q0ATC4atrjnFdsxQyDPDIVqkLEjkYfWyrrUtCAqz1D-vw5n7YkYuIfcUuJt6XQNkL4wWB9KF-hrdeW-rkDgrZvJlLpJ6I-PnrYbcEc9LWPCRRZYMmLfikvDnR4pc6tGNI4UqOV7rnL915ciKc8YJz6MVP2QfEIiR8twqoBlc9RGaShbmQLvZ2eWEzApuJV8frBFgTS8GsUlplL6B6BlBa5HE5jyYBWCwZPnIcuopa94Ke12AsgONEBhjw2VI7_z2Hnj-9TCvyW2ZSeavzm44DPHuqLp97wEIWYfAP_eM0eFhhytyqtW1Ib) Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: Jake Oakman
subject: The debate is tonight — are you watching?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Are you planning on watching the debate? We want to spread the Governor’s message to as many Hoosiers as possible. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Hey Friend - it’s Jake.

Governor Holcomb will step on the debate stage for the final time tonight at 7pm EDT.

_Are you planning on watching? We want to spread the Governor’s message to as many Hoosiers as possible. _

The stakes are extremely high for Indiana in 2020. It’s more important than ever to make sure you’re prepared and informed when you go to the ballot box, and watching the debates are a great way to do just that.

The first debate made it clear that Governor Holcomb’s experienced, steady leadership and record of accomplishments are unmatched in our race. Eric is the right choice to keep Indiana moving forward and we’re excited to watch him prove it again tonight.

**Use the link below to tune in and hear more about how Governor Holcomb plans on building One Indiana for All.**
[**Watch the debate**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6a4cf83b5d1a4acd9e1d75b5d3902149&_e=urnsLDaak1cizglOrN05jDPLAW_Fn1gLcdZGsmq25Zz4TAmPWVHxKmGgz3eCjCe_JmNy-HCgnFsfFuCTMpAynfgUjEJlxnjHM24plz1Ub2ICUEblmwbQmlr-WmP5OveIsUTNm0oSl9N7qdrYIgVYrO56rk3Qqp2TiVLjWNAuHo_x8cIlkUyPqsvSOwDPIU7kQWbtCIEIrAM94ljbdRchOMUcVR8irGdU8xUASDqujb-g3YtS_Prm60722qKy5ZncwU0j5y9OnOFph014rN2k5mvHMf-_lC1FJDQsaeIKtGVOpV6aKp--FDXq1h1cGz3i5QXJzaCwBpDLBpSnTd-0frgHJ7TYyVhE78dsaCYNjrj5BhNopl65L0aciwWUrgIoB8_E0spfOk1oJtzih9_KdJsLsYqlAxV0wa2JxEWUT3dGSckGh7xmC7nDOUGXmF2x1aDHRB54U6N5vPIGrwU0FXIuT4I677jsTXsxZ9jgwkU%3D)
Thank you for your support — and make sure you tune in!.

Best,

Jake Oakman
Holcomb Crew

subject: One week away from Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
We are officially ONE WEEK AWAY from Election Day. We’re in the final stretch, and this is not the time to sit back and watch from the sidelines. Th Peter, We are officially ONE WEEK AWAY from Election Day.
We’re in the final stretch, and this is not the time to sit back and watch from the sidelines. This election is too important -- we can’t afford to leave anything to chance.
With so little time remaining, I am coming to you with an urgent appeal.
**[Will you chip in right now to help keep Ohio red and elect Republicans up and down our state?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=ccbbdd95ff75404b9f6953734267db89&_e=afkyiVEYqGCBNgvGe3TuIOpoZf5Qui3AtTz6t_i2bb6JCwFvY0U0Hr4Sst92JdbUoLrLJo_7QFel9ng-qOG5p8GK923ze1lkwIyAWVpWl5Ctray0Cwdgq9ljZtotDHYfgXrcFLsFLU1BDUxeKa-4IFX47Sinf42I9mAc27aTITRtO0b8gC5EG_zO4A0V6xgjNHg01o4cJC4Zgm-_dqweao3GoZUlsbOT7N0jpCo3eLN6L1jrVEyJ5ZrRq8iZVLHIFVoWe-81N2--6TQyPRe9okrcRSQTfJ6qOyB215bjZmXbHJie7lqc_rtCUpTolrLd2meFEKzoFPg26Fn-TKyOPwlqt31_keC7RAspxMByNr15hIMEUDHd_QOG4WbFGvUPQp2bVMAeXCtmj9s1BLUmZIhUCrttq2-E1HUTa0jLX4M%3D)** [**ONE WEEK FUND**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=ccbbdd95ff75404b9f6953734267db89&_e=afkyiVEYqGCBNgvGe3TuIOpoZf5Qui3AtTz6t_i2bb6JCwFvY0U0Hr4Sst92JdbUoLrLJo_7QFel9ng-qOG5p8GK923ze1lkwIyAWVpWl5Ctray0Cwdgq9ljZtotDHYfgXrcFLsFLU1BDUxeKa-4IFX47Sinf42I9mAc27aTITRtO0b8gC5EG_zO4A0V6xgjLnhEeSaU-Xge0VXLa9lZ8RsAhChE9wPreEG4LYm6KE5z34yIqBV3MVlAmkCxNOPObxW-cHRQUM5-GWqE6Jh6Qn8wXMnaK8hP-_vIvXzouH9-FvXcdTZOgJ8-uw2c-iqRjXMgvY_0PlzYvfO5BchKQMRWeh0Pl5RxLKeI_R4zy8CM7Fr2brvp8qivuk_6oVYhRjlERigYgyWk_3zwyTjwO6EIqR3sf-bn8-hWHBv36dw%3D) The radical Democrats have shown their cards and they’re prepared on day one to push through their job-killing Green New Deal, pack the Supreme Court and to raise taxes on Ohio families and small businesses.

Will you step up and help us fill in the gap? With your help, we can ensure that every Republican has the resources they need to win a resounding victory on Election Day.
The future of our state and our country are on the ballot this year. And the Democrats have made it clear that they will cower to the most radical, most liberal policies in their party, no matter the costs to us or the economy.

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Nate Silver just said something BIG about Texas:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Nate Silver just said
something BIG about Texas:

“Without question, Texas is the biggest redistricting prize up for grabs
this year”

Thanks to recent population growth in Texas, we’re expected to gain three
more congressional districts after redistricting. Those new districts
could be gerrymandered into GOP strongholds if we don’t flip the Texas
State House, which would be absolutely devastating in the efforts to keep
the U.S. House blue.

That’s why we need to do everything in our power to Take Back the
House. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43972?refcode=ema20201027-110620&t=1001&akid=110620%2E444211%2EcICeb2 ]Please rush a donation of
$3 to help us fight gerrymandering and Take Back the House.

Not only is taking back the State House extremely important, but it’s also
totally doable. We only need to flip nine districts – and there are
currently nine Republican-held districts that voted for Beto in 2018.
Plus, there are another 13 districts that are within reach if enough
voters turnout.

We know the numbers are on our side – NBC even announced Texas as a
Toss-Up! Now, we just need to turn out as many voters as possible for
these 22 State House candidates.

That’s why, tomorrow evening, hundreds of volunteers from around the
country will be joining Beto to call voters in those 22 competitive
districts. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43972?refcode=ema20201027-110620&t=1002&akid=110620%2E444211%2EcICeb2 ]Can you rush a donation of $3 to help us Take
Back the House and end gerrymandering in Texas?

Let's flip Texas,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

P.S. Can’t donate right now? [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43966?source=ema20201027-110620&t=1003&akid=110620%2E444211%2EcICeb2 ]Join us to make calls tomorrow evening to
Take Back the House!

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: reaching out about Jackie Gordon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgMikZtAh-I19Sp-pkDdPuCKg4y4N2alqJWwvvhqyLw=/FYBZT6R1nEMBhv_uRwynwQYFcqQLVP1Opmcsj3qfBCo=)
---
| Peter, I firmly believe that by electing more leaders who understand the value of service to country, we can make meaningful progress on the biggest challenges facing families right now. [_**So today, I 'm reaching out to ask if you'll split a contribution between Jackie Gordon, a combat veteran and teacher, who is running to flip New York's second congressional district from red to blue and me. >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgMikZtAh-I19Sp-pkDdPuCKg4y4N2alqJWwvvhqyLw=/FYBZT6R1nEMBhv_uRwynwQYFcqQLVP1Opmcsj3qfBCo=) | | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgMikZtAh-I19Sp-pkDdPuCKg4y4N2alqJWwvvhqyLw=/FYBZT6R1nEMBhv_uRwynwQYFcqQLVP1Opmcsj3qfBCo=)
---
Jackie has served our country honorably, not only as a lieutenant colonel, but also as a former educator and councilwoman. At a time when blind partisanship and loyalty to special interests have been the compass for entrenched politicians, Jackie would bring fresh leadership to Washington as the first woman to represent her district.
But she's facing an uphill climb to get there, Peter. Jackie's district is one of the only open seats on the map, and since a string of election forecasters moved her race to a toss up, the GOP establishment has poured millions into stopping her from winning.
**We need another woman in Congress who knows the deep meaning of service to country. But Jackie needs our support to win her incredibly competitive -- and expensive -- toss-up race. **
_**[It 's all coming down to the final 7 days, so if you can, it would mean the world to me if you'd split a donation between our campaigns. I'm so excited to serve alongside Jackie in Congress, but first we both need to win tight races. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgMikZtAh-I19Sp-pkDdPuCKg4y4N2alqJWwvvhqyLw=/FYBZT6R1nEMBhv_uRwynwQYFcqQLVP1Opmcsj3qfBCo=)**_
| [SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgMikZtAh-I19Sp-pkDdPuCKg4y4N2alqJWwvvhqyLw=/FYBZT6R1nEMBhv_uRwynwQYFcqQLVP1Opmcsj3qfBCo=)
---
Thank you so much for all you're doing to fix what's broken in Washington and restore faith in those who serve our country. Best, _Abigail_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/wgMikZtAh-I19Sp-pkDdPuCKg4y4N2alqJWwvvhqyLw=/FYBZT6R1nEMBhv_uRwynwQYFcqQLVP1Opmcsj3qfBCo=)

body:
**Abbott Condemns Fletcher's Anti-Business Record**

As the 7th District works to recover from the coronavirus pandemic, our elected leaders must support our businesses and entrepreneurs and empower them to continue to build and innovate. Representative Fletcher's record of supporting anti-business policies in Congress, particularly her vote to overturn Texas' Right to Work Law, demonstrates she is incapable of leading the recovery necessary to rebuild Houston's economy.

By voting to overturn Texas' Right to Work Law, Fletcher voted to:
* Deny Texans the right to work independently;
* Force them to pay union dues, regardless of their desire to join a union;
* Eliminate protections against political intimidation in the workplace;
* And, force disclosure of personal information without workers' consent.

Fletcher's decision to support this destructive legislation is yet another reminder that her first priority is to serve the political priorities of her party, not the people of Texas' 7th District. And today, Governor Abbott released the following statement affirming that Fletcher's anti-business record has no place in the Texas.

_"Congresswoman Fletcher has made it clear that she is willing to sell out the First Amendment rights of hardworking Texans in favor of failed far left policies,"_**said Governor Abbott.**_"Texas stands as a shining example of the success of right-to-work laws – they are crucial to keeping our economy thriving and offer important privacy and employment protections for workers. Voters in CD-7 should remember Congresswoman Fletcher’s inexcusable betrayal of Texas workers at the ballot box, and instead vote for Wesley Hunt who will fight to uphold Texas’ right-to-work laws and protect hardworking Texans from the radical left’s agenda."_

_"My opponent's vote to overturn Texas' Right to Work Law is an unwelcome reminder that her loyalties lie with Nancy Pelosi and the extreme elements of her party, not the hardworking people here in Houston"_**said Hunt.** _"Fletcher's vote undermines the independence of our workers and is a blatant violation of their First Amendment rights. In Congress, I'll work to empower the hardworking Houstonians who fuel our economy, not stifle them with government overreach and federal coercion." _

_###_

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=119029cb2faa436f808891073b41987e&_e=7UZfvB9r5tZGc-1bg69gOs3ho_varhO2TtmUo_47cKY6aTRsJmf0a_ynxmPbmJWqBGlfZdEh_zAU42sKuXg7GnNdjZgc8CX-EpvdGpvvamHm8Q6wCzZcGxRVkZlFkO14NeZ5k2TM_2MrBVjFGOkRKMf16GHtkk-hIiYy6ZHoIJW854c1fynrQEtPuq1GBDFCaS1t0T7nPBj7UOGIqKe3Pkk3ky5v898IVwGjMqurDdU3njrPGxrZOhHp2Sjn81Tyc5JO69EWDF3AOQTeittzIhzys3tGOzMW6ECayEG2110%3D)****

name: Warren Democrats
subject: The outcome of this election won't come out of nowhere. It will be decided by us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We only have four days left to hit our October fundraising goal -- to fully fund our grassroots organizing plan for the most important election of our lifetimes. And we need another big push today to | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510f/45c30650/1c61c70e9/66e8acfa/2523743013/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're running out of time. We only have four days left to hit our October fundraising goal -- to fully fund our grassroots organizing plan for the most important election of our lifetimes. And we need another big push today to help make it happen.

**[Thank you for everything you've done to build this movement. If you're able to make a donation right now, please chip in $2 or whatever makes sense to help elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510f/45c30650/1c61c70e9/66e8acfd/2523743013/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMTVGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAyN19WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW15F_EOM_GOL_C_20201027_V1S2_P")**

This election will shape America for generations to come.

It will decide whether millions of people have health care coverage. Whether we can solve the climate crisis. Whether we get through this health and economic crisis by putting people first. Whether we root out corruption and make our country work for everyone -- not just the rich and powerful.

But the outcome of this election won't come out of nowhere.

It will be decided by us -- by our votes, by our voices, and by our actions: every time we remind someone to make a plan to vote, every time we make a phone call or send a text, and every time we pitch in a few bucks to help elect candidates we believe in.

**Elizabeth has endorsed over 100 Warren Democrats running strong campaigns across the country. Those candidates are counting on grassroots supporters to power them to victory. But the work we can -- or can't -- do depends on whether or not we hit this fundraising goal by Saturday.**

**[If you can, will you make a contribution right now to help hit Elizabeth's goal and support Warren Democrats in the home stretch of this election? Every donation will make a real difference to help get out the vote and grow our movement for big, structural change -- one person at a time.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510f/45c30650/1c61c70e9/66e8acfd/2523743013/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMTVGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAyN19WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW15F_EOM_GOL_C_20201027_V1S2_P")**

Thanks so much,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852510f/45c30650/1c61c70e9/66e8acfd/2523743013/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMTVGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAyN19WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW15F_EOM_GOL_C_20201027_V1S2_P")

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Loeffler offered Trump $50 million to sink her challenger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS
body:
Loeffler offered Trump $50 million to sink her challenger

Peter,
I was proud to stand with Doug
Collins at his recent Trump Defenders rally in Georgia. In the
Trump movement, we need fighters, and Doug is a real fighter.
Doug is an Iraq War veteran,
current Air Force Reserve chaplain, and former pastor.
Doug Collins is the President's
"preferred pick" for this Senate seat because he is one of his
top defenders in Congress. He took on Pelosi, Schiff, and the
rest of the anti-Trump Left during the sham impeachment.
It's not enough for us to just
re-elect President Trump this November. He needs the right team
in place to capitalize on this opportunity and get us back to the
core principles of our country. Please contribute to Doug's
conservative campaign.

Doug is running against a total
RINO: Kelly Loeffler. Let's examine her record:
Donated her WNBA team's ticket
sales to Planned Parenthood
Donated to Hillary Clinton,
Maxine Waters, and Chris Dodd
Partnered with Michael
Bloomberg's gun-grabbing organization
You may also know Kelly Loeffler
as the "Pandemic Profiteer" who sold millions of dollars worth of
stocks after a private Senate Health Committee briefing on the
Coronavirus in January.
Kelly also tried to offer
donations to the Trump campaign to push Doug Collins out of the
race. Fortunately, this President cannot be bought, and neither
can this Senate seat!
If you've had enough of these
swampy dealings, I need you to give a generous donation to my
friend, Doug Collins.
Let's help send one of President
Trump's top defenders to fight for him in the U.S. Senate!

DONATE
NOW >>>

Thank you,

Rep. Matt Gaetz
P.S. Doug Collins is in a tight
race despite being outspent 52-to-1 by his opponent! Let's give
Doug the resources he needs to fight back and defeat the D.C.
Swamp this November. Donate any amount you can before it's too
late.

PAID FOR BY COLLINS
FOR SENATE, INC.

Please take a minute to read the special
message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep
our news service free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Health insurance open enrollment
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This pandemic has shown once again how crucial it is that everyone have access to comprehensive, affordable healthcare. Here in Rhode Island, we've been national leaders in this area. Unfortunately, as a result of business closures and layoffs from COVID-19, many Rhode Islanders are now looking for new coverage. That's why I want to remind you that the open enrollment period for HealthSource RI, the state's official marketplace for health insurance coverage, begins November 1. Now is the time to sign up for new health coverage or renew your existing coverage.
We want you to be able to weigh your health coverage options safely, and so HealthSource is making it easier than ever to get help remotely. The call center has extended hours, live web chat support, virtual enrollment events, and an online application. If you're worried about the cost of coverage and are not sure what financial help you qualify for, reach out to HealthSource. They are here to help. 80% of people enrolled through HealthSource are eligible to receive financial assistance. You can visit [HealthSourceRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6ke-fnjSbLF2PEmq8G5SkSq3fuRIUOv6xYu_UlcBn0LXUqraQJWRQ3nv9vuMsqK13O9IxQy-v1Hlo8jE6tJo1b-nd5nXzqQXVokjA-cGG-Zc19dkp_LgX5UDgzIInebSnGrmiEb0L4D9ZZAg0_1JA==&c=vaJyjBdQn-K4ToLrWVpVO6yWISx-GZLHCQJlaSvhK_MPP3Uc4wOTgw==&ch=Zw2-ZhrJr0qksEmOCPmxLPqMlSUMADHED93gkPjcN2NRtN9fxRDb2w==) for information.
During a pandemic, having insurance is more important than ever, and we want to make sure all Rhode Islanders are covered. To give Rhode Islanders as much time as possible to enroll in high-quality, low- or no-cost coverage, we're extending this open enrollment period through January 23, 2021. We encourage you to sign up early to ensure that you don't have any gap in your health coverage at the start of the new year. Please sign up by December 23, 2020, to have coverage for January 1, 2021.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6ke-fnjSbLF2PEmq8G5SkSq3fuRIUOv6xYu_UlcBn0LXUqraQJWRRWWm_hb83kx1TtWu7NLOGsevHeyOFtxNBBhmzDPiqM9zXAqEdQ6fdbPR5D6vHvnRk5H7pGoAVpqeEOBQOqp74ZrXFq6p2bRzedr81faeDPe21MpN86Co8ikukPSIgrnAAmIHfnbHeOEL6GvhjeB6eVal0Sb1tXRhVuR5PH-1PCWddsCxWwO_52lckNpxwxFTXf2bSSsFrKC6VXfIjMImmmfLNo6H9yBGAz7n_r8k_53R-UKJftIayXRC5wffT3F3N2lu8IoMDLdDeDtUv5C4Tw=&c=vaJyjBdQn-K4ToLrWVpVO6yWISx-GZLHCQJlaSvhK_MPP3Uc4wOTgw==&ch=Zw2-ZhrJr0qksEmOCPmxLPqMlSUMADHED93gkPjcN2NRtN9fxRDb2w==).

name: Jaime Harrison
subject: heartbreaking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- It'd be heartbreaking to wake up on November 4th filled with regret. [**That's why I'm personally asking for $3 today to help defeat Lindsey Graham and flip the Senate >>**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f04789/1056709545/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
I know your $3 may seem inconsequential, but every dollar matters in an election as close as this one.
**There is only one week until Election Day, the nonpartisan Cook Political Report says our race is a toss-up, and a recent poll has me ahead of Lindsey Graham by 2 points!**
But a McConnell-aligned super PAC just added $10 million to Lindsey's war chest to launch a barrage of attack ads and SINK our campaign. We've worked way too hard and given way too much to quit now, so I have to ask:
[**Will you rush a donation of $3 to help defeat Lindsey Graham and flip the Senate? Thousands in South Carolina are undecided and I'm counting on your help today to win their vote.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f04789/1056709545/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jaime Harrison and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f0478a/1056709545/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f0478b/1056709545/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f047f4/1056709545/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f04789/1056709545/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Look, if you know my story then you know I'll never lose hope.
My grandfather paved roads for a living and my grandmother worked in a factory. There were days we had our cereal with water because milk cost too much. Now I'm a stone's throw away from representing families like mine in the United States Senate.
In just a few days, we'll either pull off the upset of a lifetime or fall just a little bit short. We've got what it takes to win, but not if we stop in front of the finish line.
[**If you want to send Lindsey home and give Joe Biden and Kamala Harris a Democratic Senate, then I need you to chip in right away. Please click here to give $3 or whatever you can -- we're running out of time.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f04789/1056709545/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for everything. It means the world to me.
Jaime Harrison
U.S. Senate Candidate, South Carolina
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d0/2a380d31/20521f87/f04789/1056709545/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyN19td2g0amhfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20201027_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chuck=20Rocha?=
subject: This is it
body:
We have 7 days left to turn out every Latino to vote | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5c4dc1b0bef7/this-is-it?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | Dear ,

We have one week left to change the course of this country by electing Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris to the White House and ushering in a Democratic Senate.

With your help, we have been able to do incredible work with Nuestro PAC and the Latino community. Just today we announced that we are airing radio ads in San Antonio and border counties in Texas to turn out Latino voters during early vote and on election day.

We can do the same in counties across the country, but in order to do this we will continue to need your support. Your donations have allowed us to reach thousands of Latinos. We are counting on your support to finish what we started and get out the vote!

**[Will you donate $5 or more to help get every Latino in the United States out to vote?](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=6e1ccfdb47&e=b8f90417f9)**

Thank you for your support. Now, let’s bring this home!

In Solidarity,

Chuck Rocha

name: David Kubal
subject: Pray for Justice Barrett
body:
As a person of faith, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds right now to sign the AMY CONEY BARRETT SUPREME COURT CONFIRMATION PRAYER CARD.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativeintel.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_s=5dfc835b8a9d4be49bd8e933623956a7&_t=Rl4QKWtwLx_8IKVW0BoYxTwrCIuSuuB5nZXyz5-x0p0hCNdN04v_gY1-02DX-Sys4UV_4SCKQ1q1WMpVwN39Ial9tG_DVxMJiBNYfEkm4jJ9TgSpVU2FTokE8-R4ShpBTiGs2r_nicPavjW4xSP0Kwr3jRtYKWzi3oed-JDtoeCWtC78E7f8ucEs0gxNGfZA9a7rIXZxcDE62pvl3hu-H5NW5h_uLrKRz-BMDiyj5Do%3D)
Dear Fellow American,
**[As a person of faith, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds right now to sign the AMY CONEY BARRETT SUPREME COURT CONFIRMATION PRAYER CARD.](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=5dfc835b8a9d4be49bd8e933623956a7&_e=7-zfTKfHOKs-sTGImtdgGOcndlM9jgM2oqjmiis6eBQmcVJLFG8-mobf4l15w8YJN8JZUAQvRreE1xycG9zASM0OghVKgIXpLDen7O4Wk7oUKAb9mpjzM0-5GJ6Zwx631UEiKV8fEdCgHLegsSn5yyBogZRkDESnlHt1m0ZFhutgzG1Ka40fUIiFHKyxToSeZ86axAN01jgwXz-OtPdzfSNuZJslkiM46rm0vt2MhRvvw2cPXLh-psj95_yy_51pXL9fpR4LeyHuR16FwEneqM_svGrniv7hYrTggqbLPwaUuwO9V0KIdYutWlwzjMAoxkeN-n4jpJxVBSLE-fAiBpKOgtExmjzXGa09AZVTSAC4RRoIuaRT0gWo9jK5Zf1ZJffISOa6sNz9L3OPbLUfow%3D%3D)**
Just a few weeks ago in the Rose Garden at the White House, Judge Amy Coney Barrett walked up to the podium next to President Donald J. Trump to accept her nomination to the United States Supreme Court.
Not a minute later, the Godless Left began spewing condemnation on Amy _**for her faith.**_
Right now, America faces a critical question...will we stand up for religious liberty or not?
The radical Left have shown their true colors by attacking Judge Barrett for her Catholic faith alone.
This time they’re attacking a Supreme Court Nominee...but next time, friend, they could be attacking **you** or **me** for _our_ Christian Faith...
**[But by signing this prayer card...you can boldly stand up for your faith and ask our gracious Lord and Savior to strengthen Amy right now.](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=5dfc835b8a9d4be49bd8e933623956a7&_e=7-zfTKfHOKs-sTGImtdgGOcndlM9jgM2oqjmiis6eBQmcVJLFG8-mobf4l15w8YJN8JZUAQvRreE1xycG9zASM0OghVKgIXpLDen7O4Wk7oUKAb9mpjzM0-5GJ6Zwx631UEiKV8fEdCgHLegsSn5yyBogZRkDESnlHt1m0ZFhutgzG1Ka40fUIiFHKyxToSeRlB5s2MJDf3x35IR95okhc9znhY00y45gboyi6JFuprH9Up2DZ7xE_cNoza8eLMC31_0xZHyu5X0e_dXLH_QeSED55dzKlmhzVeeGc4sy-gQP1H6P1l_XvDbHYwC7a8F12SQzYKOXWveCJ2iCyewWoOB7XPPTRZUHddMcKb_24gFvNWlqIn-FKOZUHImJU70cpwCjnMRcCN1hJCAgJAsQg%3D%3D)**
Just last week, during her Supreme Court Confirmation Hearings, Judge Barrett endured a grueling series of hateful questions from the new age Left attempting to tear her down because she’s a praying American like you and me.
**They’ve attacked her family** ... outrageously calling her a “white colonizer” for adopting two children from Haiti.
**They’ve attacked her religious beliefs** ... one senator saying: “the dogma lives loudly within you”.
**And they’ve attacked her integrity** ... another senator tried to smear Judge Barrett by continuously asking her whether she had sexually assaulted anyone -- even _**after**_ Judge Barrett plainly said she had not.
These derogatory questions and comments serve no other purpose than to tear Judge Barrett down.
...she even told all of the Senators in the hearing that she’s doing her best to stay off social media because the attacks on her and her family have been so hurtful.
We need her to know she’s not in this fight alone---but that her brothers and sisters in Christ have her back.
Today I need your help as a prayer leader within your community to combat the evil opposition Amy is facing with around the clock prayer protection.
**[So will you sign this PRAYER CARD for Judge Amy Coney Barrett right now?](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=5dfc835b8a9d4be49bd8e933623956a7&_e=7-zfTKfHOKs-sTGImtdgGOcndlM9jgM2oqjmiis6eBQmcVJLFG8-mobf4l15w8YJN8JZUAQvRreE1xycG9zASM0OghVKgIXpLDen7O4Wk7oUKAb9mpjzM0-5GJ6Zwx631UEiKV8fEdCgHLegsSn5yyBogZRkDESnlHt1m0ZFhutgzG1Ka40fUIiFHKyxToSe2PimRSwCIdmn1VeCtX4klEhdr_8e99_IIdEHFRYM1CmGb2JPcQXK26BbdlLHpu7BSW_Jpn5yoETF9ICz7_4Yyc170W832cl7OgqPbiwtKynHMhhbUy6wU0_tCjvp3CnefBLiHDHTzVCHXi_uld62OUhP00jlUR3hu30QbuFMXVd5oYLGi0wLtD0he6EdfTo5CsibYCk_GRjxcRDIEyxytQ%3D%3D)**
The simple truth is, now more than ever our country needs a Conservative, Pro-Life, pro-religious liberty Justice on the Supreme Court --- and that’s **_exactly_** who Amy is. Friend, our Constitution is clear:
_“No religious test shall ever be required as a qualification to any office...”_ _- Article VI, U.S. Constitution_
If the radical Left had their way, Amy’s faith would be a **_disqualification_** for serving on the Supreme Court.
We’re praying that Amy Coney Barrett will be quickly confirmed and that her faith will be an example to Christians all over the world.
_“For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes, to the Jew first and also to the Greek” – Romans 1:16_
We must remember that God’s word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. As believers we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to:
* Grant Amy Coney Barrett boldness and strength to glorify God through the persecution she is going to endure (1 peter 4:16).
* Remind Amy that she is blessed in Christ even when her enemies persecute her and utter all kinds of evil against her falsely on Christ’s account (Matthew 5:10-11).
* Ensure that justice will prevail during Amy’s confirmation hearings and that she will be vindicated (Psalm 94:15).
* Grant Amy courage and wisdom in the face of threats and intimidation from her enemy’s evil snares (Psalm 110:1-2; Ephesians 6:13).

clean_body: As a person of faith, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds right now to sign the AMY CONEY BARRETT SUPREME COURT CONFIRMATION PRAYER CARD. Dear Fellow American, Just a few weeks ago in the Rose Garden at the White House, Judge Amy Coney Barrett walked up to the podium next to President Donald J. Trump to accept her nomination to the United States Supreme Court. Not a minute later, the Godless Left began spewing condemnation on Amy for her faith. Right now, America faces a critical question...will we stand up for religious liberty or not? The radical Left have shown their true colors by attacking Judge Barrett for her Catholic faith alone. This time they’re attacking a Supreme Court Nominee...but next time, friend, they could be attacking you or me for our Christian Faith... Just last week, during her Supreme Court Confirmation Hearings, Judge Barrett endured a grueling series of hateful questions from the new age Left attempting to tear her down because she’s a praying American like you and me. They’ve attacked her family ... outrageously calling her a “white colonizer” for adopting two children from Haiti. They’ve attacked her religious beliefs ... one senator saying: “the dogma lives loudly within you”. And they’ve attacked her integrity ... another senator tried to smear Judge Barrett by continuously asking her whether she had sexually assaulted anyone -- even after Judge Barrett plainly said she had not. These derogatory questions and comments serve no other purpose than to tear Judge Barrett down. ...she even told all of the Senators in the hearing that she’s doing her best to stay off social media because the attacks on her and her family have been so hurtful. We need her to know she’s not in this fight alone---but that her brothers and sisters in Christ have her back. Today I need your help as a prayer leader within your community to combat the evil opposition Amy is facing with around the clock prayer protection. The simple truth is, now more than ever our country needs a Conservative, Pro-Life, pro-religious liberty Justice on the Supreme Court --- and that’s exactly who Amy is. Friend, our Constitution is clear: “No religious test shall ever be required as a qualification to any office...” - Article VI, U.S. Constitution If the radical Left had their way, Amy’s faith would be a disqualification for serving on the Supreme Court. We’re praying that Amy Coney Barrett will be quickly confirmed and that her faith will be an example to Christians all over the world. “For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes, to the Jew first and also to the Greek” – Romans 1:16 We must remember that God’s word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. As believers we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to: Grant Amy Coney Barrett boldness and strength to glorify God through the persecution she is going to endure (1 peter 4:16). Remind Amy that she is blessed in Christ even when her enemies persecute her and utter all kinds of evil against her falsely on Christ’s account (Matthew 5:10-11). Ensure that justice will prevail during Amy’s confirmation hearings and that she will be vindicated (Psalm 94:15). Grant Amy courage and wisdom in the face of threats and intimidation from her enemy’s evil snares (Psalm 110:1-2; Ephesians 6:13). My name is David Kubal and I’m blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA). Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. Specifically, we desire to reach Christians in churches and communities nationwide with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer. That’s exactly why I’ve written directly to you today. Please know that you’re helping build a community of faithful Americans praying for Supreme Court Nominee Barrett during this trying time. Together we will help Amy stand strong in her faith and be confirmed for the Supreme Court by getting millions of Americans praying. Thank you for being a prayer warrior I can count on. name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Election countdown. Get your Voter Guide today!
body:
| | Peter, The election is just one week away. Are you prepared to vote on every election and referendum on your ballot? The My Faith Votes Voter Guide will tell you exactly what’s on your ballot and where the candidates stand on issues. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201027com01&n=1) If you have already voted or done your election research, take just a few minutes to send this resource to your friends, family and church community to equip and motivate them to vote as well. We also have a [_helpful one-page presidential voter guide_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201027com01&n=2) that’s easy for you to share. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201027com01&n=3) Together, let’s do all we can to stand for biblical values like the sanctity of life, religious freedom, and marriage and family at the polls. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201027com01&n=4) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201027com01&n=5) P.S. We’ve created an [Election Day Prayer Guide for you to use here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjnils8FOPZXv7qrnZ9h4VbYUTfCtHtrgQv7t5fXorWApA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201027com01&n=6). name: Team Patty
subject: Doug Jones and Gary Peters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Yesterday, Senators Gary Peters of Michigan and Doug Jones of Alabama did the right thing and voted against the confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court -- despite the close races they are facing one week from now and the political consequences they could face.
Both Gary and Doug have already received an onslaught of TV, radio, and digital attack ads from GOP dark money groups and super PACS -- and even more are expected in the final days.
**[Can you rush in a $5 donation to keep Gary Peters and Doug Jones in the Senate?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201027-peters-jones?refcode=em201027i_527&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
The Republican challengers in Michigan and Alabama both said that they would have supported Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation to the Supreme Court -- and they will be doing everything they can to use this vote against Gary Peters and Doug Jones in the closing days of this race.
The best way to push back against these attacks is with a huge surge of grassroots momentum. We only have one week left -- and we need to do everything we possibly can to win these fights.
**[Will you pitch in $5 or any amount now to re-elect Gary Peters and Doug Jones?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201027-peters-jones?refcode=em201027i_527&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Patty

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201027-peters-jones?refcode=em201027i_527&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933c2/22080b68/7989d7c8/46021aee/839024331/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933c2/22080b68/7989d7c8/46021aed/839024331/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

#
Team,
Yesterday, Democratic Senators Doug Jones of Alabama and Gary Peters of Michigan took a stand and voted to stop the confirmation of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court.
While we came up short in the vote, it is so important that every Democratic Senator went on the record against this confirmation -- but now, the GOP is targeting Doug and Gary for defeat.

We only have one week left until Election Day -- and we can expect the GOP to spend whatever it takes to run non-stop television ads attacking Doug and Gary for their Supreme Court votes.
We need to ensure our Democratic champions have the resources they need in the final stretch.
****[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help Gary and Doug fight back and win these fights?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201027-jones-peters?refcode=em201027i_4700&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

Team Rosen

name: Team Durbin
subject: one week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Did you see Senator Durbin's message yesterday, Peter?
**[We need all hands on deck to flip the Senate one week from today. Pitch in $5 now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201027i_1078&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**[Contribute](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201027i_1078&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Dick Durbin---
Peter,
The American people might think that the Senate would be doing everything in our power to address the COVID-19 pandemic -- but they would be wrong. Instead, Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP fast-tracked President Trump's nominee to fill the vacancy on the U.S. Supreme Court.
There has been an orange cloud over this confirmation from the start -- and the reason that the Republicans have rushed this process is simple. They needed to confirm a right-wing justice to the Supreme Court before their case to eliminate the Affordable Care Act is heard on November 10.
**[Now, the American people can send the Republicans a clear message by taking away their Senate majority. Will you pitch in $5 now to help Democrats flip the Senate?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201027i_1078&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
There has never been a Supreme Court Justice confirmed this close to Election Day. It is shameful that Senate Republicans turned their back on tradition and their own precedent from 2016 to pursue this power grab and install a conservative justice to support the GOP's agenda.
We can't afford more of Mitch McConnell's failed leadership. We need to elect a Democratic Senate majority -- and that starts by defending our Democratic Senate seat right here in Illinois.
**[Make a $5 contribution right now to keep this seat blue and take back the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201027i_1078&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201026-acb-vote?refcode=em201027i_1078&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *

Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4527/42ab3cf4/66710008/135d19ae/2983726867/VEsB/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

subject: Hey you...no, not YOU, YOU!
body:
Hello! This email list is big: over 65,000 supporters. And it’s diverse -- we’ve got a handful of folks who give a small, consistent donation to ever | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9ac0551f1e03/hey-youno-not-you-you?e=140a9b81e7)

#
Hello!

This email list is big: over 65,000 supporters. And it’s diverse -- we’ve got a handful of folks who give a small, consistent donation to every single email, a handful of people who’ve given big donations to emails that spoke to them, and lots of people in between. And we also have people on this list who haven’t invested yet.

You’ve been watching our race, and you’ve seen us go from longshot, super grassroots sitting around my kitchen table to...well, still super grassroots, still at my kitchen table, but no longer a longshot!

**We’ve got a really good chance at unseating Adam Kinzinger in an upset that rivals Kendra Horn or Lucy McBath in 2018. **

Right now, we are on TV throughout this district, and we are raising money to keep our ads running night and day.

Now is the time -- those of you who’ve donated before, feel free to take a rest (for a minute)! And those of you who haven’t, I’m asking you directly: [_**Can you please, tonight, demonstrate your faith in our ability to pull out a win and chip in?**_](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=74580b56a8&e=140a9b81e7) We are going to do it, and I want to do it with you!

Thanks so much,
Dani

I don't have good news, Fellow Conservative.

A couple weeks ago, Arizona was declared no longer a toss-up. **Now, the latest polls are finding that Biden holds a _steady_ lead over Trump in AZ.**

**Arizona hasn't voted for a Democrat president since 1996.**

In the Senate race, Mark Kelly, _a Democrat,_ leads my friend and colleague Martha McSally.

**[This is bigger than Arizona. Recent polls show AZ is going to be the deciding state for control of the White House _and_ Congress.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c2eb48d1e8f4ffa8a7a13af53ffffdc&_e=G0TWoxklUshNy3fzPfdUsOw4db8ydMGfkVdaVHoZptzFdjv7Ra0zgNE8UfvrsjImfofdFPYD-eBi0Nek8_al5AYqStTzpuhqel607u5R5jnQz_LEiLKDA9i265btq6deSSEbYUdOxn1ASuZA7DRLLF0K9peu4R0J2W12HWKjsGcjowEzzCWDqeHWSdxB26R8Z9QSvCZvioWqGUE7JYdWEFSsEFPzNGfFY2Btu2ZWwdW2Xf1X_0yIF-YBs68RNCiqel2sJu_ly-OIsZPKkXh51y4sooAUG1K32WLgoq2v_VxYBsNQkFZ7R445hdRm49HvXN2as7OIuXSn_3brS0y8pg%3D%3D)** **I need the immediate support of every grassroots conservative across the nation to prove the polls and pundits wrong.**

I need the immediate support of every grassroots conservative across the nation to prove the polls and pundits wrong.
